    {
      "lines": [
        "     \"\"\"",
        "     Wraps the presence collection and notifies Qt when something changes.",
        "     The VM lives on the Qt thread and receives signals forwarded from asyncio.",
        "+",
        "+    Updated to work with UserService for unified user data management.",
        "     \"\"\"",
        " ",
        "     presence_changed = Signal()",
        " ",
        "-    def __init__(self) -> None:",
        "+    def __init__(self, user_service: Optional[\"UserService\"] = None) -> None:",
        "         super().__init__()",
        "         self._users: Dict[str, UserPresence] = {}",
        "+        self._user_service = user_service",
        " ",
        "     # --------------------------------------------------------------------- API",
        "     def all_users(self) -> List[UserPresence]:"
      ],
      "newLines": 16,
      "newStart": 124,
      "oldLines": 13,
      "oldStart": 115
    },
    {
      "lines": [
        "         Slot invoked by the asyncio runner; marshals JSON into our dataclass and",
        "         emits a notification to the UI controls.",
        "         \"\"\"",
        "+        # Handle both old presence.updated format and new user_service format",
        "+        last_active = evt.get(\"last_active\") or evt.get(\"updated_at\")",
        "+        if isinstance(last_active, str):",
        "+            last_active = datetime.fromisoformat(last_active)",
        "+        elif last_active is None:",
        "+            last_active = datetime.utcnow()",
        "+",
        "         user = UserPresence(",
        "             user_id=evt[\"user_id\"],",
        "-            display_name=evt.get(\"display_name\", evt[\"user_id\"]),",
        "-            status=evt.get(\"status\", \"unknown\"),",
        "-            last_active=datetime.fromisoformat(evt[\"last_active\"]),",
        "-            avatar_url=evt.get(\"avatar_url\"),",
        "+            display_name=evt.get(\"display_name\", evt.get(\"metadata\", {}).get(\"display_name\", evt[\"user_id\"])),",
        "+            status=evt.get(\"status\", evt.get(\"state\", \"unknown\")),",
        "+            last_active=last_active,",
        "+            avatar_url=evt.get(\"avatar_url\", evt.get(\"metadata\", {}).get(\"avatar_path\")),",
        "         )",
        "         LOG.debug(\"Presence updated: %s\", user)",
        "         self._users[user.user_id] = user",
        "         self.presence_changed.emit()",
        " ",
        "+    def update_from_user_service(self) -> None:",
        "+        \"\"\"Update presence data from the UserService.\"\"\"",
        "+        if self._user_service:",
        "+            for user_view in self._user_service.get_all_users():",
        "+                updated_at = user_view.get(\"status_updated_at\")",
        "+                if isinstance(updated_at, str):",
        "+                    updated_at = datetime.fromisoformat(updated_at)",
        "+                elif updated_at is None:",
        "+                    updated_at = datetime.utcnow()",
        "+",
        "+                user = UserPresence(",
        "+                    user_id=user_view[\"user_id\"],",
        "+                    display_name=user_view.get(\"display_name\", user_view[\"user_id\"]),",
        "+                    status=user_view.get(\"status\", \"offline\"),",
        "+                    last_active=updated_at,",
        "+                    avatar_url=user_view.get(\"avatar_path\"),",
        "+                )",
        "+                self._users[user.user_id] = user",
        "+            self.presence_changed.emit()",
        "+",
        "     # ----------------------------------------------------------- Diagnostics",
        "     def __repr__(self) -> str:  # pragma: no cover",
        "         return f\"<PresenceViewModel users={len(self._users)}>\""
      ],

    {
      "lines": [
        " ",
        " ",
        " ################################################################################",
        "-# Presence Service (async)",
        "+# Presence Module Service (uses UserService internally)",
        " ################################################################################",
        "-class PresenceService:",
        "+class PresenceModuleService:",
        "     \"\"\"",
        "     Background asyncio component responsible for:",
        " ",
        "-        \u2022 Subscribing to the presence topic",
        "+        \u2022 Interfacing with the unified UserService",
        "+        \u2022 Subscribing to presence events",
        "         \u2022 Forwarding updates into the Qt world (thread-safe)",
        "+",
        "+    This replaces the old PresenceService, now delegating to UserService.",
        "     \"\"\"",
        " ",
        "-    _TOPIC = \"users.presence\"",
        "+    _TOPIC = \"presence.updated\"",
        " ",
        "-    def __init__(self, bus: EventBus, vm: PresenceViewModel, qt_obj: QObject) -> None:",
        "+    def __init__(",
        "+        self,",
        "+        bus: EventBus,",
        "+        vm: PresenceViewModel,",
        "+        qt_obj: QObject,",
        "+        user_service: Optional[\"UserService\"] = None,",
        "+    ) -> None:",
        "         self._bus = bus",
        "         self._vm = vm",
        "         self._qt_obj = qt_obj",
        "+        self._user_service = user_service",
        " ",
        "     async def start(self) -> None:",
        "-        # Subscribe for push updates coming from remote users",
        "+        # Subscribe for push updates coming from UserService",
        "         self._bus.subscribe(self._TOPIC, self._handle_presence)",
        "+        # Also subscribe to the old topic for backwards compatibility",
        "+        self._bus.subscribe(\"users.presence\", self._handle_presence)",
        " ",
        "-        # Send an initial handshake for the local user (if desired)",
        "-        await self._publish_local_presence(\"online\")",
        "+        # If we have a UserService, start it and set initial status",
        "+        if self._user_service:",
        "+            self._user_service.start()",
        "+            await self._user_service.start_async()",
        "+            # Update VM with initial data",
        "+            self._vm.update_from_user_service()",
        "+        else:",
        "+            # Fallback: Send an initial handshake for the local user",
        "+            await self._publish_local_presence(\"online\")",
        "+            # Emit a heartbeat every 30 s so others know we're still alive",
        "+            asyncio.create_task(self._heartbeat())",
        " ",
        "-        # Emit a heartbeat every 30 s so others know we're still alive",
        "-        asyncio.create_task(self._heartbeat())",
        "+    async def stop(self) -> None:",
        "+        \"\"\"Stop the service and clean up.\"\"\"",
        "+        if self._user_service:",
        "+            await self._user_service.stop_async()",
        "+            self._user_service.stop()",
        " ",
        "     # ---------------------------------------------------------------- internals",
        "     async def _handle_presence(self, payload: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:"
      ],
      "newLines": 56,
      "newStart": 230,
      "oldLines": 32,
      "oldStart": 191
    },

      "lines": [
        "         )",
        " ",
        "     async def _publish_local_presence(self, status: str) -> None:",
        "+        \"\"\"Fallback presence publishing when UserService is not available.\"\"\"",
        "         payload = {",
        "             \"user_id\": self._local_user(),",
        "             \"display_name\": self._local_user(),  # demo",
        "             \"status\": status,",
        "+            \"state\": status,",
        "             \"last_active\": datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),",
        "+            \"updated_at\": datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),",
        "             \"avatar_url\": None,",
        "+            \"metadata\": {},",
        "         }",
        "         await self._bus.publish(self._TOPIC, payload)",
        " ",

        "+        \"\"\"Fallback heartbeat when UserService is not available.\"\"\"",

      "lines": [
        "         return Path.home().name",

        " ",
        "+# Backwards compatibility alias",
        "+PresenceService = PresenceModuleService",
        "+",
        "+",
        " ################################################################################",
        " # Plugin System (Providers, Rich-Presence, etc.)",
        " ################################################################################"
      ],
      "newLines": 10,
      "newStart": 323,
      "oldLines": 6,
      "oldStart": 255
    },
    {
      "lines": [
        " ################################################################################",
        " # Bootstrap",
        " ################################################################################",
        "-async def _async_main(bus: EventBus) -> None:",
        "+async def _async_main(bus: EventBus, user_service: Optional[\"UserService\"] = None) -> None:",
        "     app = QApplication.instance() or QApplication(sys.argv)",
        " ",
        "-    vm = PresenceViewModel()",
        "+    vm = PresenceViewModel(user_service=user_service)",
        "     widget = PresenceListWidget(vm)",
        "     widget.resize(240, 400)",
        "     widget.show()",
        " ",
        "-    # Async service & plugins",
        "-    service = PresenceService(bus, vm, widget)",
        "+    # Async service & plugins - now using PresenceModuleService with UserService",
        "+    service = PresenceModuleService(bus, vm, widget, user_service=user_service)",
        "     await service.start()",
        " ",
        "     for prov in _load_providers():"
      ],
      "newLines": 16,
      "newStart": 356,
      "oldLines": 16,
      "oldStart": 284
    },
    {
      "lines": [
        " ",
        "     await loop.run_in_executor(None, app.exec)",
        " ",
        "+    # Cleanup",
        "+    await service.stop()",
        " ",
        "+",
        " def main() -> None:  # pragma: no cover",
        "     \"\"\"",
        "     Entry-point used by the micro-frontend launcher **or** when the file is"
      ],
      "newLines": 10,
      "newStart": 386,
      "oldLines": 7,
      "oldStart": 314
    },
    {
      "lines": [
        "         format=\"%(asctime)s | %(levelname)-8s | %(name)s -> %(message)s\",",
        "     )",
        "     bus: EventBus = _InProcessBus()  # dev fallback",
        "+",
        "+    # Create UserService if available",
        "+    user_service = None",
        "+    if UserService is not None:",
        "+        user_service = UserService(bus, user_id=Path.home().name)",
        "+",
        "     try:",
        "-        asyncio.run(_async_main(bus))",
        "+        asyncio.run(_async_main(bus, user_service))",
        "     except KeyboardInterrupt:",
        "         LOG.info(\"Shutting down.\")",
        " ",
        " ",
        " if __name__ == \"__main__\":  # pragma: no cover",
        "-    main()",
        "\\ No newline at end of file",
        "+    main()"
      ],

      "newStart": 400,
      "oldLines": 11,
      "oldStart": 325
