    {
      "lines": [
        "     changes and the GUI.  It subscribes to an *EventBus*, receives",
        "     events like ``presence.updated`` or ``presence.left``, and updates",
        "     an internal QAbstractListModel exposed to QML.",
        "+",
        "+    Updated to optionally use the unified UserService for user data.",
        "     \"\"\"",
        " ",
        "     presenceListChanged = QtCore.Signal()  # emitted when the model pointer itself changes"
      ],
      "newLines": 8,
      "newStart": 244,
      "oldLines": 6,
      "oldStart": 215
    },
    {
      "lines": [
        "         bus: EventBus | None = None,",
        "         *,",
        "         current_user_id: Optional[str] = None,",
        "+        user_service: Optional[\"UserService\"] = None,",
        "         parent: Optional[QtCore.QObject] = None,",
        "     ):",
        "         super().__init__(parent)"
      ],
      "newLines": 7,
      "newStart": 260,
      "oldLines": 6,
      "oldStart": 229
    },
    {
      "lines": [
        "         self._log = logging.getLogger(self.__class__.__name__)",
        "         self._bus: EventBus = bus or _default_bus",
        "         self._current_user_id = current_user_id",
        "+        self._user_service = user_service",
        " ",
        "         # Our roster list-model",
        "         self._model = PresenceListModel(self)"
      ],
      "newLines": 7,
      "newStart": 268,
      "oldLines": 6,
      "oldStart": 236
    },
    {
      "lines": [
        "         Command from the UI to update somebody's presence manually.",
        "         Usually only called for *self*.  Publishes an event so the",
        "         backend broadcasts to everybody else.",
        "+",
        "+        If UserService is available, delegates to it.",
        "         \"\"\"",
        "         try:",
        "             status = PresenceStatus[raw_status.upper()]",
        "-        except KeyError as exc:",
        "+        except KeyError:",
        "             self.errorOccurred.emit(f\"Invalid status: {raw_status}\")",
        "             self._log.warning(\"Rejected invalid presence status %s\", raw_status)",
        "             return",
        " ",
        "-        payload = {",
        "-            \"user_id\": user_id,",
        "-            \"status\": status.name,",
        "-            \"timestamp\": _dt.datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),",
        "-        }",
        "-        self._bus.publish(\"presence.set_status\", payload)",
        "+        # If we have a UserService and this is for the current user, use it",
        "+        if self._user_service and user_id == self._current_user_id:",
        "+            self._user_service.set_status_sync(raw_status.lower())",
        "+        else:",
        "+            # Fall back to event bus",
        "+            payload = {",
        "+                \"user_id\": user_id,",
        "+                \"status\": status.name,",
        "+                \"state\": raw_status.lower(),",
        "+                \"timestamp\": _dt.datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),",
        "+            }",
        "+            self._bus.publish(\"presence.set_status\", payload)",
        " ",
        "+    def update_from_user_service(self) -> None:",
        "+        \"\"\"Update the roster from the UserService.\"\"\"",
        "+        if not self._user_service:",
        "+            return",
        "+",
        "+        entries = []",
        "+        for user_view in self._user_service.get_all_users():",
        "+            updated_at = user_view.get(\"status_updated_at\")",
        "+            if isinstance(updated_at, str):",
        "+                updated_at = _dt.datetime.fromisoformat(updated_at)",
        "+            elif updated_at is None:",
        "+                updated_at = _dt.datetime.utcnow()",
        "+",
        "+            status_str = user_view.get(\"status\", \"offline\")",
        "+            status = PresenceStatus.from_string(status_str)",
        "+",
        "+            entry = PresenceEntry(",
        "+                user_id=user_view[\"user_id\"],",
        "+                display_name=user_view.get(\"display_name\", user_view[\"user_id\"]),",
        "+                status=status,",
        "+                last_active=updated_at,",
        "+                avatar_path=user_view.get(\"avatar_path\"),",
        "+            )",
        "+            entries.append(entry)",
        "+",
        "+        self._model.upsert_entries(entries)",
        "+        self.presenceListChanged.emit()",
        "+",
        "     # ------------------------------------------------------------------#",
        "     # Private helpers \u2013 bus / async",
        "     # ------------------------------------------------------------------#"
      ],
      "newLines": 57,
      "newStart": 306,
      "oldLines": 21,
      "oldStart": 273
    },
    {
      "lines": [
        "         \"\"\"",
        "         Ask the backend for the initial roster list via RPC-style",
        "         request/response.  We use asyncio so as not to block the Qt loop.",
        "+",
        "+        If UserService is available, use it to populate initial data.",
        "         \"\"\"",
        "+        if self._user_service:",
        "+            # Use UserService for initial data",
        "+            self.update_from_user_service()",
        "+            return",
        " ",
        "         async def request_snapshot():",
        "             try:"
      ],
      "newLines": 13,
      "newStart": 371,
      "oldLines": 7,
      "oldStart": 302
    },
    {
      "lines": [
        "     # Snapshot \u2013 full presence list",
        "     def _on_snapshot(self, payload):",
        "         self._log.debug(\"Received presence.snapshot %s\", payload)",
        "-        entries = [",
        "-            PresenceEntry(",
        "-                user_id=e[\"user_id\"],",
        "-                display_name=e[\"display_name\"],",
        "-                status=PresenceStatus[e[\"status\"].upper()],",
        "-                last_active=_dt.datetime.fromisoformat(e[\"last_active\"]),",
        "-            )",
        "-            for e in payload.get(\"members\", [])",
        "-            if \"user_id\" in e",
        "-        ]",
        "+        entries = []",
        "+        for e in payload.get(\"members\", []):",
        "+            if \"user_id\" not in e:",
        "+                continue",
        "+            try:",
        "+                status_str = e.get(\"status\", \"offline\")",
        "+                status = PresenceStatus.from_string(status_str)",
        "+                last_active = e.get(\"last_active\")",
        "+                if isinstance(last_active, str):",
        "+                    last_active = _dt.datetime.fromisoformat(last_active)",
        "+                else:",
        "+                    last_active = _dt.datetime.utcnow()",
        "+",
        "+                entry = PresenceEntry(",
        "+                    user_id=e[\"user_id\"],",
        "+                    display_name=e.get(\"display_name\", e[\"user_id\"]),",
        "+                    status=status,",
        "+                    last_active=last_active,",
        "+                    avatar_path=e.get(\"avatar_path\"),",
        "+                )",
        "+                entries.append(entry)",
        "+            except Exception:",
        "+                self._log.exception(\"Failed to parse presence entry: %s\", e)",
        "+",
        "         self._sync_to_qt(self._model.upsert_entries, entries)",
        " ",
        "     # Incremental updates",
        "     def _on_presence_updated(self, payload):",
        "         self._log.debug(\"presence.updated %s\", payload)",
        "-        entry = PresenceEntry(",
        "-            user_id=payload[\"user_id\"],",
        "-            display_name=payload.get(\"display_name\", payload[\"user_id\"]),",
        "-            status=PresenceStatus[payload[\"status\"].upper()],",
        "-            last_active=_dt.datetime.utcnow(),",
        "-        )",
        "-        self._sync_to_qt(self._model.upsert_entries, [entry])",
        " ",
        "+        # Handle both Event wrapper and direct payload",
        "+        if hasattr(payload, \"payload\"):",
        "+            data = payload.payload",
        "+        elif isinstance(payload, dict):",
        "+            data = payload",
        "+        else:",
        "+            return",
        "+",
        "+        try:",
        "+            status_str = data.get(\"status\") or data.get(\"state\", \"offline\")",
        "+            status = PresenceStatus.from_string(status_str)",
        "+",
        "+            last_active = data.get(\"updated_at\") or data.get(\"last_active\")",
        "+            if isinstance(last_active, str):",
        "+                last_active = _dt.datetime.fromisoformat(last_active)",
        "+            else:",
        "+                last_active = _dt.datetime.utcnow()",
        "+",
        "+            # Get display name from metadata if present (UserService format)",
        "+            metadata = data.get(\"metadata\", {})",
        "+            display_name = data.get(\"display_name\") or metadata.get(\"display_name\") or data[\"user_id\"]",
        "+            avatar_path = data.get(\"avatar_path\") or metadata.get(\"avatar_path\")",
        "+",
        "+            entry = PresenceEntry(",
        "+                user_id=data[\"user_id\"],",
        "+                display_name=display_name,",
        "+                status=status,",
        "+                last_active=last_active,",
        "+                avatar_path=avatar_path,",
        "+            )",
        "+            self._sync_to_qt(self._model.upsert_entries, [entry])",
        "+        except Exception:",
        "+            self._log.exception(\"Failed to parse presence update: %s\", data)",
        "+",
        "     # User left \u2013 remove from list",
        "     def _on_presence_left(self, payload):",
        "         self._log.debug(\"presence.left %s\", payload)",
        "-        self._sync_to_qt(self._model.remove_user, payload[\"user_id\"])",
        "+        if hasattr(payload, \"payload\"):",
        "+            data = payload.payload",
        "+        elif isinstance(payload, dict):",
        "+            data = payload",
        "+        else:",
        "+            return",
        " ",
        "+        self._sync_to_qt(self._model.remove_user, data[\"user_id\"])",
        "+",
        "     # ------------------------------------------------------------------#",
        "     # Cleanup",
        "     # ------------------------------------------------------------------#"
      ],
      "newLines": 82,
      "newStart": 412,
      "oldLines": 34,
      "oldStart": 337
    },
    {
      "lines": [
        "             except Exception:  # pragma: no cover",
        "                 self._log.warning(\"Failed to dispose subscription %s\", sub, exc_info=True)",
        "         for task in self._tasks:",
        "-            task.cancel()",
        "\\ No newline at end of file",
        "+            task.cancel()"
      ],
      "newLines": 4,
      "newStart": 499,
      "oldLines": 4,
      "oldStart": 376
