        "+            drag.setHotSpot(QPoint(pixmap.width() // 2, pixmap.height() // 2))",

      "newStart": 383,
      "oldLines": 9,
      "oldStart": 330
    },
    {
      "lines": [
        "     This interface is implemented elsewhere in the presence module.",
        " ",
        "     PresenceWidget only relies on the signals described below.",
        "+",
        "+    Updated to optionally use UserService.",
        "     \"\"\"",
        " ",
        "     presence_changed = Signal(list)  # List[Colleague]",
        " ",
        "+    def __init__(self, user_service: Optional[\"UserService\"] = None) -> None:",
        "+        super().__init__()",
        "+        self._user_service = user_service",
        "+",
        "     # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #",
        "     # API expected by the widget                                         #",
        "     # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #",
        " ",
        "-    def refresh(self) -> None: ...  # noqa: D400",
        "+    def refresh(self) -> None:",
        "+        \"\"\"Refresh presence data.\"\"\"",
        "+        if self._user_service:",
        "+            # Trigger a refresh from UserService",
        "+            colleagues = []",
        "+            for user_view in self._user_service.get_all_users():",
        "+                colleagues.append(Colleague.from_user_view(user_view))",
        "+            self.presence_changed.emit(colleagues)",
        " ",
        "     def snapshot(self) -> List[Colleague]:",
        "         \"\"\"Return current presence list synchronously.\"\"\"",
        "+        if self._user_service:",
        "+            colleagues = []",
        "+            for user_view in self._user_service.get_all_users():",
        "+                colleagues.append(Colleague.from_user_view(user_view))",
        "+            return colleagues",
        "         return []",
        " ",
        "     def build_mime_data(self, uid: str) -> \"QMimeData\": ...  # noqa: D401"
      ],
      "newLines": 36,
      "newStart": 401,
      "oldLines": 18,
      "oldStart": 347
    },

      "lines": [
        "         def __init__(self) -> None:",
        "             super().__init__()",
        "             self._colleagues = [",
        "-                Colleague(\"1\", \"Alice\", \":/avatars/alice.png\", PresenceState.ONLINE),",
        "-                Colleague(\"2\", \"Bob\", \":/avatars/bob.png\", PresenceState.AWAY),",
        "-                Colleague(\"3\", \"Charlie\", \":/avatars/charlie.png\", PresenceState.OFFLINE),",
        "+                Colleague(\"1\", \"Alice\", \":/avatars/alice.png\", \"online\"),",
        "+                Colleague(\"2\", \"Bob\", \":/avatars/bob.png\", \"away\"),",
        "+                Colleague(\"3\", \"Charlie\", \":/avatars/charlie.png\", \"offline\"),",
        "             ]",
        " ",
        "         def refresh(self) -> None:",
        "             logger.info(\"Refresh called from UI\")",

        " ",

      ],

52. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/tmp/project_copy/flockdesk/shared/widgets/avatar_widget.py"
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "\"\"\"\nflockdesk.shared.widgets.avatar_widget\n--------------------------------------\n\nReusable widget that displays (and manages) a user\u2019s avatar picture with\nreal-time presence indication, theme awareness, drag-and-drop support and an\nextensible context-menu.\n\nThe widget is intended to be used throughout the FlockDesk desktop client:\nin chat lists, white-board collaborators, community dashboards, etc.\n\nTypical usage\n~~~~~~~~~~~~~\navatar = AvatarWidget(\n    user_id=\"42\",\n    event_bus=inject.instance(EventBus),          # optional\n    theme_manager=inject.instance(ThemeManager),  # optional\n)\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport logging\nimport os\nimport sys\nfrom collections import OrderedDict\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom typing import Optional\n\nfrom PySide6.QtCore import (QEvent, QPoint, QRunnable, QSize, Qt, QThreadPool,\n                            QUrl, Signal, Slot)\nfrom PySide6.QtGui import (QAction, QContextMenuEvent, QDragEnterEvent,\n                           QDropEvent, QIcon, QImage, QMouseEvent, QPainter,\n                           QPixmap)\nfrom PySide6.QtWidgets import (QFileDialog, QMenu, QMessageBox, QWidget)\n\n__all__ = [\"AvatarWidget\"]\n\nlog = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# (Optional) third-party FlockDesk services\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n\nclass _DummyBus:\n    \"\"\"Stand-in for the real application-wide EventBus (if not imported).\"\"\"\n\n    def subscribe(self, *_a, **_kw):\n        pass\n\n    def publish(self, *_a, **_kw):\n        pass\n\n\nclass _DummyTheme:\n    \"\"\"Stand-in for the real ThemeManager (hot-swappable themes).\"\"\"\n\n    def color(self, key: str, fallback: str = \"#CCCCCC\") -> str:\n        return fallback\n\n\ntry:\n    from flockdesk.core.event_bus import EventBus\nexcept Exception:  # pragma: no cover\n    EventBus = _DummyBus  # type: ignore\n\n\ntry:\n    from flockdesk.core.theme import ThemeManager\nexcept Exception:  # pragma: no cover\n    ThemeManager = _DummyTheme  # type: ignore\n\n\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Pixmap caching helpers\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n\nclass _PixmapCache:\n    \"\"\"\n    Very small LRU cache that stores pixmaps keyed by absolute path.\n    Prevents re-decoding identical images when the avatar is shown in multiple\n    locations at once.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    _MAX_ENTRIES = 32\n    _store: OrderedDict[str, QPixmap] = OrderedDict()\n\n    @classmethod\n    def get(cls, path: str) -> Optional[QPixmap]:\n        try:\n            pixmap = cls._store.pop(path)\n            cls._store[path] = pixmap  # move to end (most recently used)\n            return pixmap\n        except KeyError:\n            return None\n\n    @classmethod\n    def put(cls, path: str, pixmap: QPixmap) -> None:\n        cls._store[path] = pixmap\n        cls._store.move_to_end(path)\n        # evict least recently used\n        while len(cls._store) > cls._MAX_ENTRIES:\n            cls._store.popitem(last=False)\n\n\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Asynchronous loader used to decode / scale the avatar off the UI thread\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n\nclass _AvatarLoader(QRunnable):\n    \"\"\"\n    Decode and scale a QPixmap in a thread-pool to avoid UI jank when very\n    large images are supplied.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        path: str,\n        target_size: QSize,\n        on_loaded: \"Signal[QPixmap]\",\n    ) -> None:\n        super().__init__()\n        self._path = path\n        self._target_size = target_size\n        self._on_loaded = on_loaded\n\n    def run(self) -> None:  # noqa: D401\n        try:\n            image = QImage(self._path)\n            if image.isNull():\n                raise ValueError(f\"Unable to load image: {self._path}\")\n\n            # Preserve aspect ratio, crop to square, then scale\n            side = min(image.width(), image.height())\n            cropped = image.copy(\n                (image.width() - side) // 2,\n                (image.height() - side) // 2,\n                side,\n                side,\n            )\n            scaled = cropped.scaled(\n                self._target_size,\n                Qt.KeepAspectRatio,\n                Qt.SmoothTransformation,\n            )\n            pixmap = QPixmap.fromImage(scaled)\n            _PixmapCache.put(self._path, pixmap)\n            self._on_loaded.emit(pixmap)\n        except Exception:  # pragma: no cover\n            log.exception(\"Failed to load avatar: %s\", self._path)\n\n\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Avatar widget\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n\nclass AvatarWidget(QWidget):\n    \"\"\"\n    Displays a round avatar with an optional presence badge.\n\n    Signals\n    -------\n    clicked: Signal[None]\n        Emitted on left mouse click.\n    avatarChanged: Signal[str]\n        Emitted when the user changes his / her avatar locally.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    clicked = Signal()\n    avatarChanged = Signal(str)\n\n    _DRAG_MIME_WHITELIST = {\n        \"image/png\",\n        \"image/jpeg\",\n        \"image/webp\",\n        \"image/gif\",\n    }\n    _DEFAULT_SIZE = 64\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        user_id: str,\n        *,\n        size: int | None = None,\n        event_bus: Optional[EventBus] = None,\n        theme_manager: Optional[ThemeManager] = None,\n        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,\n    ) -> None:\n        super().__init__(parent)\n\n        self.setAcceptDrops(True)\n        self.setCursor(Qt.PointingHandCursor)\n        self.setFixedSize(QSize(size or self._DEFAULT_SIZE, size or self._DEFAULT_SIZE))\n\n        # dependencies\n        self._user_id = user_id\n        self._event_bus = event_bus or _DummyBus()\n        self._theme = theme_manager or _DummyTheme()\n\n        # runtime state\n        self._avatar_path: Optional[str] = None\n        self._pixmap: Optional[QPixmap] = None\n        self._presence: str = \"offline\"  # offline, online, busy, away \u2026\n        self._thread_pool = QThreadPool.globalInstance()\n\n        self._install_event_listeners()\n\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    # Public API\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    def avatar(self) -> Optional[str]:\n        \"\"\"Return absolute path of current avatar (may be None).\"\"\"\n        return self._avatar_path\n\n    def presence(self) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Return the current presence key (online / busy / \u2026).\"\"\"\n        return self._presence\n\n    @Slot(str)\n    def set_avatar(self, path: str) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Update the avatar from the given image path.\"\"\"\n        path = os.path.abspath(path)\n        if not os.path.exists(path):\n            log.warning(\"Avatar path does not exist: %s\", path)\n            return\n\n        self._avatar_path = path\n        cached = _PixmapCache.get(path)\n        if cached is not None:\n            self._pixmap = cached\n            self.update()\n        else:\n            loader = _AvatarLoader(\n                path=path,\n                target_size=self.size(),\n                on_loaded=self._on_async_loaded,\n            )\n            self._thread_pool.start(loader)\n\n    @Slot(str)\n    def set_presence(self, state: str) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Update presence overlay, e.g. from the event-bus.\"\"\"\n        if state == self._presence:\n            return\n        self._presence = state\n        self.update()\n\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    # Event handling\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    def paintEvent(self, event):  # noqa: D401\n        \"\"\"Paint circular avatar with presence badge.\"\"\"\n        painter = QPainter(self)\n        painter.setRenderHint(QPainter.Antialiasing)\n\n        if self._pixmap and not self._pixmap.isNull():\n            painter.setBrush(Qt.NoBrush)\n            path = self._rounded_rect_path()\n            painter.setClipPath(path)\n            painter.drawPixmap(self.rect(), self._pixmap)\n        else:\n            # fallback placeholder\n            painter.setBrush(\n                self._theme.color(\"avatar.background\", \"#8F8F8F\")\n            )\n            painter.setPen(Qt.NoPen)\n            painter.drawEllipse(self.rect())\n\n        self._draw_presence_indicator(painter)\n\n    def mousePressEvent(self, event: QMouseEvent):  # noqa: D401\n        if event.button() == Qt.LeftButton:\n            self.clicked.emit()\n        super().mousePressEvent(event)\n\n    def dragEnterEvent(self, event: QDragEnterEvent):  # noqa: D401\n        if any(fmt in event.mimeData().formats() for fmt in self._DRAG_MIME_WHITELIST):\n            event.acceptProposedAction()\n\n    def dropEvent(self, event: QDropEvent):  # noqa: D401\n        url: QUrl\n        for url in event.mimeData().urls():\n            if url.isLocalFile():\n                self._handle_new_avatar(Path(url.toLocalFile()))\n                event.acceptProposedAction()\n                return\n        QMessageBox.warning(self, \"Invalid file\", \"Please drop a local image file.\")\n\n    def contextMenuEvent(self, event: QContextMenuEvent):  # noqa: D401\n        menu = QMenu(self)\n\n        choose_action = QAction(\"Change avatar \u2026\", self)\n        choose_action.triggered.connect(self._choose_avatar)\n        menu.addAction(choose_action)\n\n        menu.addSeparator()\n\n        if self._avatar_path:\n            reveal = QAction(\"Reveal in Explorer\", self)\n            reveal.triggered.connect(self._reveal_in_file_manager)\n            menu.addAction(reveal)\n\n        menu.exec(event.globalPos())\n\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    # Internal helpers\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    def _install_event_listeners(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"\n        Subscribe to application-wide events: theme change, presence updates\n        for our user, etc.\n        \"\"\"\n        # presence update\n        if isinstance(self._event_bus, EventBus):\n            self._event_bus.subscribe(\n                \"presence.changed\",\n                handler=lambda e: (\n                    self.set_presence(e.payload[\"state\"])\n                    if e.payload.get(\"user_id\") == self._user_id\n                    else None\n                ),\n            )\n\n        # theme hot reload\n        if isinstance(self._theme, ThemeManager):\n            self._theme.themeChanged.connect(lambda: self.update())  # type: ignore\n\n    @Slot(QPixmap)\n    def _on_async_loaded(self, pixmap: QPixmap) -> None:\n        self._pixmap = pixmap\n        self.update()\n\n    def _rounded_rect_path(self):\n        \"\"\"Returns a QPainterPath of a circle matching widget size.\"\"\"\n        from PySide6.QtGui import QPainterPath\n\n        path = QPainterPath()\n        path.addEllipse(self.rect())\n        return path\n\n    def _draw_presence_indicator(self, painter: QPainter) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Paint a small presence dot on bottom-right corner.\"\"\"\n        colors = {\n            \"online\": \"#4CAF50\",\n            \"busy\": \"#F44336\",\n            \"away\": \"#FFB300\",\n            \"offline\": \"#9E9E9E\",\n        }\n        radius = max(6, self.width() // 6)\n        center = QPoint(self.width() - radius, self.height() - radius)\n\n        painter.setPen(Qt.NoPen)\n        painter.setBrush(colors.get(self._presence, \"#9E9E9E\"))\n        painter.drawEllipse(center, radius, radius)\n\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------\n    # Context-menu actions\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    def _choose_avatar(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Open file-dialog for user to pick a new avatar picture.\"\"\"\n        filename, _ = QFileDialog.getOpenFileName(\n            self,\n            \"Select Avatar Picture\",\n            \"\",\n            \"Images (*.png *.jpg *.jpeg *.webp *.gif)\",\n        )\n        if filename:\n            self._handle_new_avatar(Path(filename))\n\n    def _handle_new_avatar(self, path: Path) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Validate and persist the chosen avatar (drag-drop or file-dialog).\"\"\"\n        if not path.exists():\n            return\n        if not path.suffix.lower() in {\".png\", \".jpg\", \".jpeg\", \".webp\", \".gif\"}:\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, \"Unsupported file\", \"File is not a supported image type.\")\n            return\n\n        self.set_avatar(str(path))\n        self.avatarChanged.emit(str(path))\n        # Publish to event-bus so other processes may sync the change\n        if isinstance(self._event_bus, EventBus):\n            self._event_bus.publish(  # type: ignore\n                \"avatar.changed\",\n                user_id=self._user_id,\n                path=str(path),\n            )\n\n    def _reveal_in_file_manager(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Platform-specific file manager reveal of the avatar file.\"\"\"\n        if not self._avatar_path:\n            return\n        try:\n            if sys.platform.startswith(\"darwin\"):\n                from subprocess import call\n\n                call([\"open\", \"--\", self._avatar_path])\n            elif os.name == \"nt\":\n                os.startfile(self._avatar_path)  # type: ignore  # pylint: disable=protected-access\n            else:  # linux, etc.\n                from subprocess import call\n\n                call([\"xdg-open\", self._avatar_path])\n        except Exception:  # pragma: no cover\n            log.exception(\"Could not open file manager for %s\", self._avatar_path)",
    "filePath": "/tmp/project_copy/flockdesk/shared/widgets/avatar_widget.py",
    "numLines": 412,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 412
  },
  "type": "text"
}
53. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "\"\"\"\nflockdesk.shared.widgets.avatar_widget\n--------------------------------------\n\nReusable widget that displays (and manages) a user's avatar picture with\nreal-time presence indication, theme awareness, drag-and-drop support and an\nextensible context-menu.\n\nThe widget is intended to be used throughout the FlockDesk desktop client:\nin chat lists, white-board collaborators, community dashboards, etc.\n\nUpdated to optionally use the unified UserService for user data and presence.\n\nTypical usage\n~~~~~~~~~~~~~\navatar = AvatarWidget(\n    user_id=\"42\",\n    event_bus=inject.instance(EventBus),          # optional\n    theme_manager=inject.instance(ThemeManager),  # optional\n    user_service=inject.instance(UserService),    # optional - unified user data\n)\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport logging\nimport os\nimport sys\nfrom collections import OrderedDict\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom typing import Optional, TYPE_CHECKING\n\nfrom PySide6.QtCore import (QEvent, QPoint, QRunnable, QSize, Qt, QThreadPool,\n                            QUrl, Signal, Slot)\nfrom PySide6.QtGui import (QAction, QContextMenuEvent, QDragEnterEvent,\n                           QDropEvent, QIcon, QImage, QMouseEvent, QPainter,\n                           QPixmap)\nfrom PySide6.QtWidgets import (QFileDialog, QMenu, QMessageBox, QWidget)\n\n__all__ = [\"AvatarWidget\"]\n\nlog = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# (Optional) third-party FlockDesk services\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n\nclass _DummyBus:\n    \"\"\"Stand-in for the real application-wide EventBus (if not imported).\"\"\"\n\n    def subscribe(self, *_a, **_kw):\n        pass\n\n    def publish(self, *_a, **_kw):\n        pass\n\n\nclass _DummyTheme:\n    \"\"\"Stand-in for the real ThemeManager (hot-swappable themes).\"\"\"\n\n    def color(self, key: str, fallback: str = \"#CCCCCC\") -> str:\n        return fallback\n\n\ntry:\n    from flockdesk.core.event_bus import EventBus\nexcept Exception:  # pragma: no cover\n    EventBus = _DummyBus  # type: ignore\n\n\ntry:\n    from flockdesk.core.theme import ThemeManager\nexcept Exception:  # pragma: no cover\n    ThemeManager = _DummyTheme  # type: ignore\n\n\n# Import the unified UserService\ntry:\n    from flockdesk.core.services.user_service import UserService\nexcept ImportError:\n    UserService = None  # type: ignore\n\n\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Pixmap caching helpers\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n\nclass _PixmapCache:\n    \"\"\"\n    Very small LRU cache that stores pixmaps keyed by absolute path.\n    Prevents re-decoding identical images when the avatar is shown in multiple\n    locations at once.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    _MAX_ENTRIES = 32\n    _store: OrderedDict[str, QPixmap] = OrderedDict()\n\n    @classmethod\n    def get(cls, path: str) -> Optional[QPixmap]:\n        try:\n            pixmap = cls._store.pop(path)\n            cls._store[path] = pixmap  # move to end (most recently used)\n            return pixmap\n        except KeyError:\n            return None\n\n    @classmethod\n    def put(cls, path: str, pixmap: QPixmap) -> None:\n        cls._store[path] = pixmap\n        cls._store.move_to_end(path)\n        # evict least recently used\n        while len(cls._store) > cls._MAX_ENTRIES:\n            cls._store.popitem(last=False)\n\n\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Asynchronous loader used to decode / scale the avatar off the UI thread\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n\nclass _AvatarLoader(QRunnable):\n    \"\"\"\n    Decode and scale a QPixmap in a thread-pool to avoid UI jank when very\n    large images are supplied.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        path: str,\n        target_size: QSize,\n        on_loaded: \"Signal[QPixmap]\",\n    ) -> None:\n        super().__init__()\n        self._path = path\n        self._target_size = target_size\n        self._on_loaded = on_loaded\n\n    def run(self) -> None:  # noqa: D401\n        try:\n            image = QImage(self._path)\n            if image.isNull():\n                raise ValueError(f\"Unable to load image: {self._path}\")\n\n            # Preserve aspect ratio, crop to square, then scale\n            side = min(image.width(), image.height())\n            cropped = image.copy(\n                (image.width() - side) // 2,\n                (image.height() - side) // 2,\n                side,\n                side,\n            )\n            scaled = cropped.scaled(\n                self._target_size,\n                Qt.KeepAspectRatio,\n                Qt.SmoothTransformation,\n            )\n            pixmap = QPixmap.fromImage(scaled)\n            _PixmapCache.put(self._path, pixmap)\n            self._on_loaded.emit(pixmap)\n        except Exception:  # pragma: no cover\n            log.exception(\"Failed to load avatar: %s\", self._path)\n\n\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Avatar widget\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n\nclass AvatarWidget(QWidget):\n    \"\"\"\n    Displays a round avatar with an optional presence badge.\n\n    Updated to optionally integrate with the unified UserService for\n    getting user profile data (avatar, presence).\n\n    Signals\n    -------\n    clicked: Signal[None]\n        Emitted on left mouse click.\n    avatarChanged: Signal[str]\n        Emitted when the user changes his / her avatar locally.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    clicked = Signal()\n    avatarChanged = Signal(str)\n\n    _DRAG_MIME_WHITELIST = {\n        \"image/png\",\n        \"image/jpeg\",\n        \"image/webp\",\n        \"image/gif\",\n    }\n    _DEFAULT_SIZE = 64\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        user_id: str,\n        *,\n        size: int | None = None,\n        event_bus: Optional[EventBus] = None,\n        theme_manager: Optional[ThemeManager] = None,\n        user_service: Optional[\"UserService\"] = None,\n        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,\n    ) -> None:\n        super().__init__(parent)\n\n        self.setAcceptDrops(True)\n        self.setCursor(Qt.PointingHandCursor)\n        self.setFixedSize(QSize(size or self._DEFAULT_SIZE, size or self._DEFAULT_SIZE))\n\n        # dependencies\n        self._user_id = user_id\n        self._event_bus = event_bus or _DummyBus()\n        self._theme = theme_manager or _DummyTheme()\n        self._user_service = user_service\n\n        # runtime state\n        self._avatar_path: Optional[str] = None\n        self._pixmap: Optional[QPixmap] = None\n        self._presence: str = \"offline\"  # offline, online, busy, away, dnd \u2026\n        self._thread_pool = QThreadPool.globalInstance()\n\n        self._install_event_listeners()\n\n        # If we have a UserService, load initial data from it\n        if self._user_service:\n            self._load_from_user_service()\n\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    # Public API\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    def avatar(self) -> Optional[str]:\n        \"\"\"Return absolute path of current avatar (may be None).\"\"\"\n        return self._avatar_path\n\n    def presence(self) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Return the current presence key (online / busy / \u2026).\"\"\"\n        return self._presence\n\n    def user_id(self) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Return the user ID for this avatar.\"\"\"\n        return self._user_id\n\n    @Slot(str)\n    def set_avatar(self, path: str) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Update the avatar from the given image path.\"\"\"\n        path = os.path.abspath(path)\n        if not os.path.exists(path):\n            log.warning(\"Avatar path does not exist: %s\", path)\n            return\n\n        self._avatar_path = path\n        cached = _PixmapCache.get(path)\n        if cached is not None:\n            self._pixmap = cached\n            self.update()\n        else:\n            loader = _AvatarLoader(\n                path=path,\n                target_size=self.size(),\n                on_loaded=self._on_async_loaded,\n            )\n            self._thread_pool.start(loader)\n\n    @Slot(str)\n    def set_presence(self, state: str) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Update presence overlay, e.g. from the event-bus or UserService.\"\"\"\n        if state == self._presence:\n            return\n        self._presence = state\n        self.update()\n\n    def refresh_from_user_service(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Refresh avatar and presence from the UserService.\"\"\"\n        if self._user_service:\n            self._load_from_user_service()\n\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    # UserService integration\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    def _load_from_user_service(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Load avatar and presence data from the UserService.\"\"\"\n        if not self._user_service:\n            return\n\n        user_view = self._user_service.get_user_view(self._user_id)\n        if user_view:\n            # Set presence from UserService\n            status = user_view.get(\"status\", \"offline\")\n            self.set_presence(status)\n\n            # Set avatar if available\n            avatar_path = user_view.get(\"avatar_path\")\n            if avatar_path:\n                self.set_avatar(avatar_path)\n\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    # Event handling\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    def paintEvent(self, event):  # noqa: D401\n        \"\"\"Paint circular avatar with presence badge.\"\"\"\n        painter = QPainter(self)\n        painter.setRenderHint(QPainter.Antialiasing)\n\n        if self._pixmap and not self._pixmap.isNull():\n            painter.setBrush(Qt.NoBrush)\n            path = self._rounded_rect_path()\n            painter.setClipPath(path)\n            painter.drawPixmap(self.rect(), self._pixmap)\n        else:\n            # fallback placeholder\n            painter.setBrush(\n                self._theme.color(\"avatar.background\", \"#8F8F8F\")\n            )\n            painter.setPen(Qt.NoPen)\n            painter.drawEllipse(self.rect())\n\n        self._draw_presence_indicator(painter)\n\n    def mousePressEvent(self, event: QMouseEvent):  # noqa: D401\n        if event.button() == Qt.LeftButton:\n            self.clicked.emit()\n        super().mousePressEvent(event)\n\n    def dragEnterEvent(self, event: QDragEnterEvent):  # noqa: D401\n        if any(fmt in event.mimeData().formats() for fmt in self._DRAG_MIME_WHITELIST):\n            event.acceptProposedAction()\n\n    def dropEvent(self, event: QDropEvent):  # noqa: D401\n        url: QUrl\n        for url in event.mimeData().urls():\n            if url.isLocalFile():\n                self._handle_new_avatar(Path(url.toLocalFile()))\n                event.acceptProposedAction()\n                return\n        QMessageBox.warning(self, \"Invalid file\", \"Please drop a local image file.\")\n\n    def contextMenuEvent(self, event: QContextMenuEvent):  # noqa: D401\n        menu = QMenu(self)\n\n        choose_action = QAction(\"Change avatar \u2026\", self)\n        choose_action.triggered.connect(self._choose_avatar)\n        menu.addAction(choose_action)\n\n        menu.addSeparator()\n\n        if self._avatar_path:\n            reveal = QAction(\"Reveal in Explorer\", self)\n            reveal.triggered.connect(self._reveal_in_file_manager)\n            menu.addAction(reveal)\n\n        menu.exec(event.globalPos())\n\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    # Internal helpers\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    def _install_event_listeners(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"\n        Subscribe to application-wide events: theme change, presence updates\n        for our user, etc.\n        \"\"\"\n        # presence update - subscribe to both old and new event formats\n        if isinstance(self._event_bus, EventBus):\n            # Old format: presence.changed\n            self._event_bus.subscribe(\n                \"presence.changed\",\n                handler=lambda e: (\n                    self.set_presence(e.payload[\"state\"])\n                    if e.payload.get(\"user_id\") == self._user_id\n                    else None\n                ),\n            )\n            # New format from UserService: presence.updated\n            self._event_bus.subscribe(\n                \"presence.updated\",\n                handler=lambda e: self._handle_presence_updated(e),\n            )\n\n        # theme hot reload\n        if isinstance(self._theme, ThemeManager):\n            self._theme.themeChanged.connect(lambda: self.update())  # type: ignore\n\n    def _handle_presence_updated(self, event) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Handle presence.updated events from UserService.\"\"\"\n        try:\n            # Handle both Event wrapper and direct dict payload\n            if hasattr(event, \"payload\"):\n                payload = event.payload\n            elif isinstance(event, dict):\n                payload = event\n            else:\n                return\n\n            if payload.get(\"user_id\") == self._user_id:\n                # Get state from either 'state' or 'status' field\n                state = payload.get(\"state\") or payload.get(\"status\", \"offline\")\n                self.set_presence(state)\n\n                # Also update avatar if present in metadata\n                metadata = payload.get(\"metadata\", {})\n                avatar_path = metadata.get(\"avatar_path\")\n                if avatar_path:\n                    self.set_avatar(avatar_path)\n        except Exception:\n            log.exception(\"Error handling presence.updated event\")\n\n    @Slot(QPixmap)\n    def _on_async_loaded(self, pixmap: QPixmap) -> None:\n        self._pixmap = pixmap\n        self.update()\n\n    def _rounded_rect_path(self):\n        \"\"\"Returns a QPainterPath of a circle matching widget size.\"\"\"\n        from PySide6.QtGui import QPainterPath\n\n        path = QPainterPath()\n        path.addEllipse(self.rect())\n        return path\n\n    def _draw_presence_indicator(self, painter: QPainter) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Paint a small presence dot on bottom-right corner.\"\"\"\n        colors = {\n            \"online\": \"#4CAF50\",\n            \"busy\": \"#F44336\",\n            \"dnd\": \"#F44336\",  # Do-Not-Disturb uses same color as busy\n            \"away\": \"#FFB300\",\n            \"offline\": \"#9E9E9E\",\n        }\n        radius = max(6, self.width() // 6)\n        center = QPoint(self.width() - radius, self.height() - radius)\n\n        painter.setPen(Qt.NoPen)\n        painter.setBrush(colors.get(self._presence.lower(), \"#9E9E9E\"))\n        painter.drawEllipse(center, radius, radius)\n\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------\n    # Context-menu actions\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    def _choose_avatar(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Open file-dialog for user to pick a new avatar picture.\"\"\"\n        filename, _ = QFileDialog.getOpenFileName(\n            self,\n            \"Select Avatar Picture\",\n            \"\",\n            \"Images (*.png *.jpg *.jpeg *.webp *.gif)\",\n        )\n        if filename:\n            self._handle_new_avatar(Path(filename))\n\n    def _handle_new_avatar(self, path: Path) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Validate and persist the chosen avatar (drag-drop or file-dialog).\"\"\"\n        if not path.exists():\n            return\n        if not path.suffix.lower() in {\".png\", \".jpg\", \".jpeg\", \".webp\", \".gif\"}:\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, \"Unsupported file\", \"File is not a supported image type.\")\n            return\n\n        self.set_avatar(str(path))\n        self.avatarChanged.emit(str(path))\n\n        # If we have a UserService, update the profile through it\n        if self._user_service and self._user_id == self._user_service.user_id:\n            profile = self._user_service.profile\n            profile.avatar_path = str(path)\n            self._user_service.save(profile)\n\n        # Publish to event-bus so other processes may sync the change\n        if isinstance(self._event_bus, EventBus):\n            self._event_bus.publish(  # type: ignore\n                \"avatar.changed\",\n                user_id=self._user_id,\n                path=str(path),\n            )\n\n    def _reveal_in_file_manager(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Platform-specific file manager reveal of the avatar file.\"\"\"\n        if not self._avatar_path:\n            return\n        try:\n            if sys.platform.startswith(\"darwin\"):\n                from subprocess import call\n\n                call([\"open\", \"--\", self._avatar_path])\n            elif os.name == \"nt\":\n                os.startfile(self._avatar_path)  # type: ignore  # pylint: disable=protected-access\n            else:  # linux, etc.\n                from subprocess import call\n\n                call([\"xdg-open\", self._avatar_path])\n        except Exception:  # pragma: no cover\n            log.exception(\"Could not open file manager for %s\", self._avatar_path)\n",
  "file_path": "/tmp/project_copy/flockdesk/shared/widgets/avatar_widget.py"
}
Output
{
  "content": "\"\"\"\nflockdesk.shared.widgets.avatar_widget\n--------------------------------------\n\nReusable widget that displays (and manages) a user's avatar picture with\nreal-time presence indication, theme awareness, drag-and-drop support and an\nextensible context-menu.\n\nThe widget is intended to be used throughout the FlockDesk desktop client:\nin chat lists, white-board collaborators, community dashboards, etc.\n\nUpdated to optionally use the unified UserService for user data and presence.\n\nTypical usage\n~~~~~~~~~~~~~\navatar = AvatarWidget(\n    user_id=\"42\",\n    event_bus=inject.instance(EventBus),          # optional\n    theme_manager=inject.instance(ThemeManager),  # optional\n    user_service=inject.instance(UserService),    # optional - unified user data\n)\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport logging\nimport os\nimport sys\nfrom collections import OrderedDict\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom typing import Optional, TYPE_CHECKING\n\nfrom PySide6.QtCore import (QEvent, QPoint, QRunnable, QSize, Qt, QThreadPool,\n                            QUrl, Signal, Slot)\nfrom PySide6.QtGui import (QAction, QContextMenuEvent, QDragEnterEvent,\n                           QDropEvent, QIcon, QImage, QMouseEvent, QPainter,\n                           QPixmap)\nfrom PySide6.QtWidgets import (QFileDialog, QMenu, QMessageBox, QWidget)\n\n__all__ = [\"AvatarWidget\"]\n\nlog = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# (Optional) third-party FlockDesk services\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n\nclass _DummyBus:\n    \"\"\"Stand-in for the real application-wide EventBus (if not imported).\"\"\"\n\n    def subscribe(self, *_a, **_kw):\n        pass\n\n    def publish(self, *_a, **_kw):\n        pass\n\n\nclass _DummyTheme:\n    \"\"\"Stand-in for the real ThemeManager (hot-swappable themes).\"\"\"\n\n    def color(self, key: str, fallback: str = \"#CCCCCC\") -> str:\n        return fallback\n\n\ntry:\n    from flockdesk.core.event_bus import EventBus\nexcept Exception:  # pragma: no cover\n    EventBus = _DummyBus  # type: ignore\n\n\ntry:\n    from flockdesk.core.theme import ThemeManager\nexcept Exception:  # pragma: no cover\n    ThemeManager = _DummyTheme  # type: ignore\n\n\n# Import the unified UserService\ntry:\n    from flockdesk.core.services.user_service import UserService\nexcept ImportError:\n    UserService = None  # type: ignore\n\n\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Pixmap caching helpers\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n\nclass _PixmapCache:\n    \"\"\"\n    Very small LRU cache that stores pixmaps keyed by absolute path.\n    Prevents re-decoding identical images when the avatar is shown in multiple\n    locations at once.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    _MAX_ENTRIES = 32\n    _store: OrderedDict[str, QPixmap] = OrderedDict()\n\n    @classmethod\n    def get(cls, path: str) -> Optional[QPixmap]:\n        try:\n            pixmap = cls._store.pop(path)\n            cls._store[path] = pixmap  # move to end (most recently used)\n            return pixmap\n        except KeyError:\n            return None\n\n    @classmethod\n    def put(cls, path: str, pixmap: QPixmap) -> None:\n        cls._store[path] = pixmap\n        cls._store.move_to_end(path)\n        # evict least recently used\n        while len(cls._store) > cls._MAX_ENTRIES:\n            cls._store.popitem(last=False)\n\n\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Asynchronous loader used to decode / scale the avatar off the UI thread\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n\nclass _AvatarLoader(QRunnable):\n    \"\"\"\n    Decode and scale a QPixmap in a thread-pool to avoid UI jank when very\n    large images are supplied.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        path: str,\n        target_size: QSize,\n        on_loaded: \"Signal[QPixmap]\",\n    ) -> None:\n        super().__init__()\n        self._path = path\n        self._target_size = target_size\n        self._on_loaded = on_loaded\n\n    def run(self) -> None:  # noqa: D401\n        try:\n            image = QImage(self._path)\n            if image.isNull():\n                raise ValueError(f\"Unable to load image: {self._path}\")\n\n            # Preserve aspect ratio, crop to square, then scale\n            side = min(image.width(), image.height())\n            cropped = image.copy(\n                (image.width() - side) // 2,\n                (image.height() - side) // 2,\n                side,\n                side,\n            )\n            scaled = cropped.scaled(\n                self._target_size,\n                Qt.KeepAspectRatio,\n                Qt.SmoothTransformation,\n            )\n            pixmap = QPixmap.fromImage(scaled)\n            _PixmapCache.put(self._path, pixmap)\n            self._on_loaded.emit(pixmap)\n        except Exception:  # pragma: no cover\n            log.exception(\"Failed to load avatar: %s\", self._path)\n\n\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Avatar widget\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n\nclass AvatarWidget(QWidget):\n    \"\"\"\n    Displays a round avatar with an optional presence badge.\n\n    Updated to optionally integrate with the unified UserService for\n    getting user profile data (avatar, presence).\n\n    Signals\n    -------\n    clicked: Signal[None]\n        Emitted on left mouse click.\n    avatarChanged: Signal[str]\n        Emitted when the user changes his / her avatar locally.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    clicked = Signal()\n    avatarChanged = Signal(str)\n\n    _DRAG_MIME_WHITELIST = {\n        \"image/png\",\n        \"image/jpeg\",\n        \"image/webp\",\n        \"image/gif\",\n    }\n    _DEFAULT_SIZE = 64\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        user_id: str,\n        *,\n        size: int | None = None,\n        event_bus: Optional[EventBus] = None,\n        theme_manager: Optional[ThemeManager] = None,\n        user_service: Optional[\"UserService\"] = None,\n        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,\n    ) -> None:\n        super().__init__(parent)\n\n        self.setAcceptDrops(True)\n        self.setCursor(Qt.PointingHandCursor)\n        self.setFixedSize(QSize(size or self._DEFAULT_SIZE, size or self._DEFAULT_SIZE))\n\n        # dependencies\n        self._user_id = user_id\n        self._event_bus = event_bus or _DummyBus()\n        self._theme = theme_manager or _DummyTheme()\n        self._user_service = user_service\n\n        # runtime state\n        self._avatar_path: Optional[str] = None\n        self._pixmap: Optional[QPixmap] = None\n        self._presence: str = \"offline\"  # offline, online, busy, away, dnd \u2026\n        self._thread_pool = QThreadPool.globalInstance()\n\n        self._install_event_listeners()\n\n        # If we have a UserService, load initial data from it\n        if self._user_service:\n            self._load_from_user_service()\n\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    # Public API\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    def avatar(self) -> Optional[str]:\n        \"\"\"Return absolute path of current avatar (may be None).\"\"\"\n        return self._avatar_path\n\n    def presence(self) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Return the current presence key (online / busy / \u2026).\"\"\"\n        return self._presence\n\n    def user_id(self) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Return the user ID for this avatar.\"\"\"\n        return self._user_id\n\n    @Slot(str)\n    def set_avatar(self, path: str) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Update the avatar from the given image path.\"\"\"\n        path = os.path.abspath(path)\n        if not os.path.exists(path):\n            log.warning(\"Avatar path does not exist: %s\", path)\n            return\n\n        self._avatar_path = path\n        cached = _PixmapCache.get(path)\n        if cached is not None:\n            self._pixmap = cached\n            self.update()\n        else:\n            loader = _AvatarLoader(\n                path=path,\n                target_size=self.size(),\n                on_loaded=self._on_async_loaded,\n            )\n            self._thread_pool.start(loader)\n\n    @Slot(str)\n    def set_presence(self, state: str) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Update presence overlay, e.g. from the event-bus or UserService.\"\"\"\n        if state == self._presence:\n            return\n        self._presence = state\n        self.update()\n\n    def refresh_from_user_service(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Refresh avatar and presence from the UserService.\"\"\"\n        if self._user_service:\n            self._load_from_user_service()\n\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    # UserService integration\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    def _load_from_user_service(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Load avatar and presence data from the UserService.\"\"\"\n        if not self._user_service:\n            return\n\n        user_view = self._user_service.get_user_view(self._user_id)\n        if user_view:\n            # Set presence from UserService\n            status = user_view.get(\"status\", \"offline\")\n            self.set_presence(status)\n\n            # Set avatar if available\n            avatar_path = user_view.get(\"avatar_path\")\n            if avatar_path:\n                self.set_avatar(avatar_path)\n\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    # Event handling\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    def paintEvent(self, event):  # noqa: D401\n        \"\"\"Paint circular avatar with presence badge.\"\"\"\n        painter = QPainter(self)\n        painter.setRenderHint(QPainter.Antialiasing)\n\n        if self._pixmap and not self._pixmap.isNull():\n            painter.setBrush(Qt.NoBrush)\n            path = self._rounded_rect_path()\n            painter.setClipPath(path)\n            painter.drawPixmap(self.rect(), self._pixmap)\n        else:\n            # fallback placeholder\n            painter.setBrush(\n                self._theme.color(\"avatar.background\", \"#8F8F8F\")\n            )\n            painter.setPen(Qt.NoPen)\n            painter.drawEllipse(self.rect())\n\n        self._draw_presence_indicator(painter)\n\n    def mousePressEvent(self, event: QMouseEvent):  # noqa: D401\n        if event.button() == Qt.LeftButton:\n            self.clicked.emit()\n        super().mousePressEvent(event)\n\n    def dragEnterEvent(self, event: QDragEnterEvent):  # noqa: D401\n        if any(fmt in event.mimeData().formats() for fmt in self._DRAG_MIME_WHITELIST):\n            event.acceptProposedAction()\n\n    def dropEvent(self, event: QDropEvent):  # noqa: D401\n        url: QUrl\n        for url in event.mimeData().urls():\n            if url.isLocalFile():\n                self._handle_new_avatar(Path(url.toLocalFile()))\n                event.acceptProposedAction()\n                return\n        QMessageBox.warning(self, \"Invalid file\", \"Please drop a local image file.\")\n\n    def contextMenuEvent(self, event: QContextMenuEvent):  # noqa: D401\n        menu = QMenu(self)\n\n        choose_action = QAction(\"Change avatar \u2026\", self)\n        choose_action.triggered.connect(self._choose_avatar)\n        menu.addAction(choose_action)\n\n        menu.addSeparator()\n\n        if self._avatar_path:\n            reveal = QAction(\"Reveal in Explorer\", self)\n            reveal.triggered.connect(self._reveal_in_file_manager)\n            menu.addAction(reveal)\n\n        menu.exec(event.globalPos())\n\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    # Internal helpers\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    def _install_event_listeners(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"\n        Subscribe to application-wide events: theme change, presence updates\n        for our user, etc.\n        \"\"\"\n        # presence update - subscribe to both old and new event formats\n        if isinstance(self._event_bus, EventBus):\n            # Old format: presence.changed\n            self._event_bus.subscribe(\n                \"presence.changed\",\n                handler=lambda e: (\n                    self.set_presence(e.payload[\"state\"])\n                    if e.payload.get(\"user_id\") == self._user_id\n                    else None\n                ),\n            )\n            # New format from UserService: presence.updated\n            self._event_bus.subscribe(\n                \"presence.updated\",\n                handler=lambda e: self._handle_presence_updated(e),\n            )\n\n        # theme hot reload\n        if isinstance(self._theme, ThemeManager):\n            self._theme.themeChanged.connect(lambda: self.update())  # type: ignore\n\n    def _handle_presence_updated(self, event) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Handle presence.updated events from UserService.\"\"\"\n        try:\n            # Handle both Event wrapper and direct dict payload\n            if hasattr(event, \"payload\"):\n                payload = event.payload\n            elif isinstance(event, dict):\n                payload = event\n            else:\n                return\n\n            if payload.get(\"user_id\") == self._user_id:\n                # Get state from either 'state' or 'status' field\n                state = payload.get(\"state\") or payload.get(\"status\", \"offline\")\n                self.set_presence(state)\n\n                # Also update avatar if present in metadata\n                metadata = payload.get(\"metadata\", {})\n                avatar_path = metadata.get(\"avatar_path\")\n                if avatar_path:\n                    self.set_avatar(avatar_path)\n        except Exception:\n            log.exception(\"Error handling presence.updated event\")\n\n    @Slot(QPixmap)\n    def _on_async_loaded(self, pixmap: QPixmap) -> None:\n        self._pixmap = pixmap\n        self.update()\n\n    def _rounded_rect_path(self):\n        \"\"\"Returns a QPainterPath of a circle matching widget size.\"\"\"\n        from PySide6.QtGui import QPainterPath\n\n        path = QPainterPath()\n        path.addEllipse(self.rect())\n        return path\n\n    def _draw_presence_indicator(self, painter: QPainter) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Paint a small presence dot on bottom-right corner.\"\"\"\n        colors = {\n            \"online\": \"#4CAF50\",\n            \"busy\": \"#F44336\",\n            \"dnd\": \"#F44336\",  # Do-Not-Disturb uses same color as busy\n            \"away\": \"#FFB300\",\n            \"offline\": \"#9E9E9E\",\n        }\n        radius = max(6, self.width() // 6)\n        center = QPoint(self.width() - radius, self.height() - radius)\n\n        painter.setPen(Qt.NoPen)\n        painter.setBrush(colors.get(self._presence.lower(), \"#9E9E9E\"))\n        painter.drawEllipse(center, radius, radius)\n\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------\n    # Context-menu actions\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    def _choose_avatar(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Open file-dialog for user to pick a new avatar picture.\"\"\"\n        filename, _ = QFileDialog.getOpenFileName(\n            self,\n            \"Select Avatar Picture\",\n            \"\",\n            \"Images (*.png *.jpg *.jpeg *.webp *.gif)\",\n        )\n        if filename:\n            self._handle_new_avatar(Path(filename))\n\n    def _handle_new_avatar(self, path: Path) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Validate and persist the chosen avatar (drag-drop or file-dialog).\"\"\"\n        if not path.exists():\n            return\n        if not path.suffix.lower() in {\".png\", \".jpg\", \".jpeg\", \".webp\", \".gif\"}:\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, \"Unsupported file\", \"File is not a supported image type.\")\n            return\n\n        self.set_avatar(str(path))\n        self.avatarChanged.emit(str(path))\n\n        # If we have a UserService, update the profile through it\n        if self._user_service and self._user_id == self._user_service.user_id:\n            profile = self._user_service.profile\n            profile.avatar_path = str(path)\n            self._user_service.save(profile)\n\n        # Publish to event-bus so other processes may sync the change\n        if isinstance(self._event_bus, EventBus):\n            self._event_bus.publish(  # type: ignore\n                \"avatar.changed\",\n                user_id=self._user_id,\n                path=str(path),\n            )\n\n    def _reveal_in_file_manager(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Platform-specific file manager reveal of the avatar file.\"\"\"\n        if not self._avatar_path:\n            return\n        try:\n            if sys.platform.startswith(\"darwin\"):\n                from subprocess import call\n\n                call([\"open\", \"--\", self._avatar_path])\n            elif os.name == \"nt\":\n                os.startfile(self._avatar_path)  # type: ignore  # pylint: disable=protected-access\n            else:  # linux, etc.\n                from subprocess import call\n\n                call([\"xdg-open\", self._avatar_path])\n        except Exception:  # pragma: no cover\n            log.exception(\"Could not open file manager for %s\", self._avatar_path)\n",
  "filePath": "/tmp/project_copy/flockdesk/shared/widgets/avatar_widget.py",
  "originalFile": "\"\"\"\nflockdesk.shared.widgets.avatar_widget\n--------------------------------------\n\nReusable widget that displays (and manages) a user\u2019s avatar picture with\nreal-time presence indication, theme awareness, drag-and-drop support and an\nextensible context-menu.\n\nThe widget is intended to be used throughout the FlockDesk desktop client:\nin chat lists, white-board collaborators, community dashboards, etc.\n\nTypical usage\n~~~~~~~~~~~~~\navatar = AvatarWidget(\n    user_id=\"42\",\n    event_bus=inject.instance(EventBus),          # optional\n    theme_manager=inject.instance(ThemeManager),  # optional\n)\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport logging\nimport os\nimport sys\nfrom collections import OrderedDict\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom typing import Optional\n\nfrom PySide6.QtCore import (QEvent, QPoint, QRunnable, QSize, Qt, QThreadPool,\n                            QUrl, Signal, Slot)\nfrom PySide6.QtGui import (QAction, QContextMenuEvent, QDragEnterEvent,\n                           QDropEvent, QIcon, QImage, QMouseEvent, QPainter,\n                           QPixmap)\nfrom PySide6.QtWidgets import (QFileDialog, QMenu, QMessageBox, QWidget)\n\n__all__ = [\"AvatarWidget\"]\n\nlog = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# (Optional) third-party FlockDesk services\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n\nclass _DummyBus:\n    \"\"\"Stand-in for the real application-wide EventBus (if not imported).\"\"\"\n\n    def subscribe(self, *_a, **_kw):\n        pass\n\n    def publish(self, *_a, **_kw):\n        pass\n\n\nclass _DummyTheme:\n    \"\"\"Stand-in for the real ThemeManager (hot-swappable themes).\"\"\"\n\n    def color(self, key: str, fallback: str = \"#CCCCCC\") -> str:\n        return fallback\n\n\ntry:\n    from flockdesk.core.event_bus import EventBus\nexcept Exception:  # pragma: no cover\n    EventBus = _DummyBus  # type: ignore\n\n\ntry:\n    from flockdesk.core.theme import ThemeManager\nexcept Exception:  # pragma: no cover\n    ThemeManager = _DummyTheme  # type: ignore\n\n\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Pixmap caching helpers\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n\nclass _PixmapCache:\n    \"\"\"\n    Very small LRU cache that stores pixmaps keyed by absolute path.\n    Prevents re-decoding identical images when the avatar is shown in multiple\n    locations at once.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    _MAX_ENTRIES = 32\n    _store: OrderedDict[str, QPixmap] = OrderedDict()\n\n    @classmethod\n    def get(cls, path: str) -> Optional[QPixmap]:\n        try:\n            pixmap = cls._store.pop(path)\n            cls._store[path] = pixmap  # move to end (most recently used)\n            return pixmap\n        except KeyError:\n            return None\n\n    @classmethod\n    def put(cls, path: str, pixmap: QPixmap) -> None:\n        cls._store[path] = pixmap\n        cls._store.move_to_end(path)\n        # evict least recently used\n        while len(cls._store) > cls._MAX_ENTRIES:\n            cls._store.popitem(last=False)\n\n\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Asynchronous loader used to decode / scale the avatar off the UI thread\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n\nclass _AvatarLoader(QRunnable):\n    \"\"\"\n    Decode and scale a QPixmap in a thread-pool to avoid UI jank when very\n    large images are supplied.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        path: str,\n        target_size: QSize,\n        on_loaded: \"Signal[QPixmap]\",\n    ) -> None:\n        super().__init__()\n        self._path = path\n        self._target_size = target_size\n        self._on_loaded = on_loaded\n\n    def run(self) -> None:  # noqa: D401\n        try:\n            image = QImage(self._path)\n            if image.isNull():\n                raise ValueError(f\"Unable to load image: {self._path}\")\n\n            # Preserve aspect ratio, crop to square, then scale\n            side = min(image.width(), image.height())\n            cropped = image.copy(\n                (image.width() - side) // 2,\n                (image.height() - side) // 2,\n                side,\n                side,\n            )\n            scaled = cropped.scaled(\n                self._target_size,\n                Qt.KeepAspectRatio,\n                Qt.SmoothTransformation,\n            )\n            pixmap = QPixmap.fromImage(scaled)\n            _PixmapCache.put(self._path, pixmap)\n            self._on_loaded.emit(pixmap)\n        except Exception:  # pragma: no cover\n            log.exception(\"Failed to load avatar: %s\", self._path)\n\n\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Avatar widget\n# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n\nclass AvatarWidget(QWidget):\n    \"\"\"\n    Displays a round avatar with an optional presence badge.\n\n    Signals\n    -------\n    clicked: Signal[None]\n        Emitted on left mouse click.\n    avatarChanged: Signal[str]\n        Emitted when the user changes his / her avatar locally.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    clicked = Signal()\n    avatarChanged = Signal(str)\n\n    _DRAG_MIME_WHITELIST = {\n        \"image/png\",\n        \"image/jpeg\",\n        \"image/webp\",\n        \"image/gif\",\n    }\n    _DEFAULT_SIZE = 64\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        user_id: str,\n        *,\n        size: int | None = None,\n        event_bus: Optional[EventBus] = None,\n        theme_manager: Optional[ThemeManager] = None,\n        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,\n    ) -> None:\n        super().__init__(parent)\n\n        self.setAcceptDrops(True)\n        self.setCursor(Qt.PointingHandCursor)\n        self.setFixedSize(QSize(size or self._DEFAULT_SIZE, size or self._DEFAULT_SIZE))\n\n        # dependencies\n        self._user_id = user_id\n        self._event_bus = event_bus or _DummyBus()\n        self._theme = theme_manager or _DummyTheme()\n\n        # runtime state\n        self._avatar_path: Optional[str] = None\n        self._pixmap: Optional[QPixmap] = None\n        self._presence: str = \"offline\"  # offline, online, busy, away \u2026\n        self._thread_pool = QThreadPool.globalInstance()\n\n        self._install_event_listeners()\n\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    # Public API\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    def avatar(self) -> Optional[str]:\n        \"\"\"Return absolute path of current avatar (may be None).\"\"\"\n        return self._avatar_path\n\n    def presence(self) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Return the current presence key (online / busy / \u2026).\"\"\"\n        return self._presence\n\n    @Slot(str)\n    def set_avatar(self, path: str) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Update the avatar from the given image path.\"\"\"\n        path = os.path.abspath(path)\n        if not os.path.exists(path):\n            log.warning(\"Avatar path does not exist: %s\", path)\n            return\n\n        self._avatar_path = path\n        cached = _PixmapCache.get(path)\n        if cached is not None:\n            self._pixmap = cached\n            self.update()\n        else:\n            loader = _AvatarLoader(\n                path=path,\n                target_size=self.size(),\n                on_loaded=self._on_async_loaded,\n            )\n            self._thread_pool.start(loader)\n\n    @Slot(str)\n    def set_presence(self, state: str) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Update presence overlay, e.g. from the event-bus.\"\"\"\n        if state == self._presence:\n            return\n        self._presence = state\n        self.update()\n\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    # Event handling\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    def paintEvent(self, event):  # noqa: D401\n        \"\"\"Paint circular avatar with presence badge.\"\"\"\n        painter = QPainter(self)\n        painter.setRenderHint(QPainter.Antialiasing)\n\n        if self._pixmap and not self._pixmap.isNull():\n            painter.setBrush(Qt.NoBrush)\n            path = self._rounded_rect_path()\n            painter.setClipPath(path)\n            painter.drawPixmap(self.rect(), self._pixmap)\n        else:\n            # fallback placeholder\n            painter.setBrush(\n                self._theme.color(\"avatar.background\", \"#8F8F8F\")\n            )\n            painter.setPen(Qt.NoPen)\n            painter.drawEllipse(self.rect())\n\n        self._draw_presence_indicator(painter)\n\n    def mousePressEvent(self, event: QMouseEvent):  # noqa: D401\n        if event.button() == Qt.LeftButton:\n            self.clicked.emit()\n        super().mousePressEvent(event)\n\n    def dragEnterEvent(self, event: QDragEnterEvent):  # noqa: D401\n        if any(fmt in event.mimeData().formats() for fmt in self._DRAG_MIME_WHITELIST):\n            event.acceptProposedAction()\n\n    def dropEvent(self, event: QDropEvent):  # noqa: D401\n        url: QUrl\n        for url in event.mimeData().urls():\n            if url.isLocalFile():\n                self._handle_new_avatar(Path(url.toLocalFile()))\n                event.acceptProposedAction()\n                return\n        QMessageBox.warning(self, \"Invalid file\", \"Please drop a local image file.\")\n\n    def contextMenuEvent(self, event: QContextMenuEvent):  # noqa: D401\n        menu = QMenu(self)\n\n        choose_action = QAction(\"Change avatar \u2026\", self)\n        choose_action.triggered.connect(self._choose_avatar)\n        menu.addAction(choose_action)\n\n        menu.addSeparator()\n\n        if self._avatar_path:\n            reveal = QAction(\"Reveal in Explorer\", self)\n            reveal.triggered.connect(self._reveal_in_file_manager)\n            menu.addAction(reveal)\n\n        menu.exec(event.globalPos())\n\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    # Internal helpers\n    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    def _install_event_listeners(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"\n        Subscribe to application-wide events: theme change, presence updates\n        for our user, etc.\n        \"\"\"\n        # presence update\n        if isinstance(self._event_bus, EventBus):\n            self._event_bus.subscribe(\n                \"presence.changed\",\n                handler=lambda e: (\n                    self.set_presence(e.payload[\"state\"])\n                    if e.payload.get(\"user_id\") == self._user_id\n                    else None\n                ),\n            )\n\n        # theme hot reload\n        if isinstance(self._theme, ThemeManager):\n            self._theme.themeChanged.connect(lambda: self.update())  # type: ignore\n\n    @Slot(QPixmap)\n    def _on_async_loaded(self, pixmap: QPixmap) -> None:\n        self._pixmap = pixmap\n        self.update()\n\n    def _rounded_rect_path(self):\n        \"\"\"Returns a QPainterPath of a circle matching widget size.\"\"\"\n        from PySide6.QtGui import QPainterPath\n\n        path = QPainterPath()\n        path.addEllipse(self.rect())\n        return path\n\n    def _draw_presence_indicator(self, painter: QPainter) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Paint a small presence dot on bottom-right corner.\"\"\"\n        colors = {\n            \"online\": \"#4CAF50\",\n            \"busy\": \"#F44336\",\n            \"away\": \"#FFB300\",\n            \"offline\": \"#9E9E9E\",\n        }\n        radius = max(6, self.width() // 6)\n        center = QPoint(self.width() - radius, self.height() - radius)\n\n        painter.setPen(Qt.NoPen)\n        painter.setBrush(colors.get(self._presence, \"#9E9E9E\"))\n        painter.drawEllipse(center, radius, radius)\n\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------\n    # Context-menu actions\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    def _choose_avatar(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Open file-dialog for user to pick a new avatar picture.\"\"\"\n        filename, _ = QFileDialog.getOpenFileName(\n            self,\n            \"Select Avatar Picture\",\n            \"\",\n            \"Images (*.png *.jpg *.jpeg *.webp *.gif)\",\n        )\n        if filename:\n            self._handle_new_avatar(Path(filename))\n\n    def _handle_new_avatar(self, path: Path) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Validate and persist the chosen avatar (drag-drop or file-dialog).\"\"\"\n        if not path.exists():\n            return\n        if not path.suffix.lower() in {\".png\", \".jpg\", \".jpeg\", \".webp\", \".gif\"}:\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, \"Unsupported file\", \"File is not a supported image type.\")\n            return\n\n        self.set_avatar(str(path))\n        self.avatarChanged.emit(str(path))\n        # Publish to event-bus so other processes may sync the change\n        if isinstance(self._event_bus, EventBus):\n            self._event_bus.publish(  # type: ignore\n                \"avatar.changed\",\n                user_id=self._user_id,\n                path=str(path),\n            )\n\n    def _reveal_in_file_manager(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Platform-specific file manager reveal of the avatar file.\"\"\"\n        if not self._avatar_path:\n            return\n        try:\n            if sys.platform.startswith(\"darwin\"):\n                from subprocess import call\n\n                call([\"open\", \"--\", self._avatar_path])\n            elif os.name == \"nt\":\n                os.startfile(self._avatar_path)  # type: ignore  # pylint: disable=protected-access\n            else:  # linux, etc.\n                from subprocess import call\n\n                call([\"xdg-open\", self._avatar_path])\n        except Exception:  # pragma: no cover\n            log.exception(\"Could not open file manager for %s\", self._avatar_path)",
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        " flockdesk.shared.widgets.avatar_widget",
        " --------------------------------------",
        " ",
        "-Reusable widget that displays (and manages) a user\u2019s avatar picture with",
        "+Reusable widget that displays (and manages) a user's avatar picture with",
        " real-time presence indication, theme awareness, drag-and-drop support and an",
        " extensible context-menu.",
        " ",
        " The widget is intended to be used throughout the FlockDesk desktop client:",
        " in chat lists, white-board collaborators, community dashboards, etc.",
        " ",
        "+Updated to optionally use the unified UserService for user data and presence.",
        "+",
        " Typical usage",
        " ~~~~~~~~~~~~~",
        " avatar = AvatarWidget(",
        "     user_id=\"42\",",
        "     event_bus=inject.instance(EventBus),          # optional",
        "     theme_manager=inject.instance(ThemeManager),  # optional",
        "+    user_service=inject.instance(UserService),    # optional - unified user data",
        " )",
        " \"\"\"",
        " "
      ],
      "newLines": 22,
      "newStart": 2,
      "oldLines": 19,
      "oldStart": 2
    },
    {
      "lines": [
        " import sys",
        " from collections import OrderedDict",
        " from pathlib import Path",
        "-from typing import Optional",
        "+from typing import Optional, TYPE_CHECKING",
        " ",
        " from PySide6.QtCore import (QEvent, QPoint, QRunnable, QSize, Qt, QThreadPool,",
        "                             QUrl, Signal, Slot)"
      ],
      "newLines": 7,

    {
      "lines": [
        "     ThemeManager = _DummyTheme  # type: ignore",

        " ",
        "+# Import the unified UserService",

        "+    from flockdesk.core.services.user_service import UserService",
        "+except ImportError:",
        "+    UserService = None  # type: ignore",
        "+",
        "+",
        " # -----------------------------------------------------------------------------",

    },
    {
      "lines": [

        "     Displays a round avatar with an optional presence badge.",
        " ",

        "+    getting user profile data (avatar, presence).",
        "+",
        "     Signals",
        "     -------",

      ],

        "         self._event_bus = event_bus or _DummyBus()",
        "         self._theme = theme_manager or _DummyTheme()",

        " ",
        "         # runtime state",

        "+        return self._user_id",

        "     @Slot(str)",
        "     def set_avatar(self, path: str) -> None:",

      ],

        " ",
        "     @Slot(str)",

        "-        \"\"\"Update presence overlay, e.g. from the event-bus.\"\"\"",
        "+        \"\"\"Update presence overlay, e.g. from the event-bus or UserService.\"\"\"",
        "         if state == self._presence:",

        "         self.update()",

        "+        if self._user_service:",

        "+",
        "     # ---------------------------------------------------------------------",

        "+    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------",

        "+    def _load_from_user_service(self) -> None:",
        "+        \"\"\"Load avatar and presence data from the UserService.\"\"\"",
        "+        if not self._user_service:",
        "+            return",
        "+",
        "+        user_view = self._user_service.get_user_view(self._user_id)",
        "+        if user_view:",
        "+            # Set presence from UserService",
        "+            status = user_view.get(\"status\", \"offline\")",
        "+            self.set_presence(status)",
        "+",
        "+            # Set avatar if available",
        "+            avatar_path = user_view.get(\"avatar_path\")",
        "+            if avatar_path:",
        "+                self.set_avatar(avatar_path)",

        "+    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------",
        "     # Event handling",
        "     # ---------------------------------------------------------------------",
        " "

        "-        # presence update",

        "         if isinstance(self._event_bus, EventBus):",
        "+            # Old format: presence.changed",
        "             self._event_bus.subscribe(",
        "                 \"presence.changed\",",
        "                 handler=lambda e: ("
      ],
      "newLines": 9,
      "newStart": 365,
      "oldLines": 8,
      "oldStart": 317
    },
    {
      "lines": [
        "                     else None",
        "                 ),",
        "             )",
        "+            # New format from UserService: presence.updated",
        "+            self._event_bus.subscribe(",
        "+                \"presence.updated\",",
        "+                handler=lambda e: self._handle_presence_updated(e),",
        "+            )",
        " ",
        "         # theme hot reload",
        "         if isinstance(self._theme, ThemeManager):",
        "             self._theme.themeChanged.connect(lambda: self.update())  # type: ignore",
        " ",
        "+    def _handle_presence_updated(self, event) -> None:",
        "+        \"\"\"Handle presence.updated events from UserService.\"\"\"",
        "+        try:",
        "+            # Handle both Event wrapper and direct dict payload",
        "+            if hasattr(event, \"payload\"):",
        "+                payload = event.payload",
        "+            elif isinstance(event, dict):",
        "+                payload = event",
        "+            else:",
        "+                return",
        "+",
        "+            if payload.get(\"user_id\") == self._user_id:",
        "+                # Get state from either 'state' or 'status' field",
        "+                state = payload.get(\"state\") or payload.get(\"status\", \"offline\")",
        "+                self.set_presence(state)",
        "+",
        "+                # Also update avatar if present in metadata",
        "+                metadata = payload.get(\"metadata\", {})",
        "+                avatar_path = metadata.get(\"avatar_path\")",
        "+                if avatar_path:",
        "+                    self.set_avatar(avatar_path)",
        "+        except Exception:",
        "+            log.exception(\"Error handling presence.updated event\")",
        "+",
        "     @Slot(QPixmap)",
        "     def _on_async_loaded(self, pixmap: QPixmap) -> None:",
        "         self._pixmap = pixmap"
