72. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "# Solution: python_desktop_development_expert_021_cross_file_refactoring_expert_01\n\n## Key Files Identified\n\n### Service Files\n- /app/project/flockdesk/core/services/profile_service.py - Original ProfileService managing static user data (DELETED)\n- /app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/service.py - Original PresenceService managing dynamic status data (DELETED)\n- /app/project/flockdesk/core/services/user_service.py - NEW unified UserService replacing both services\n\n### Consumer Files Updated\n- /app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/main.py - Updated to use UserService\n- /app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/viewmodel/presence_vm.py - Updated to use UserService\n- /app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/view/presence_widget.py - Updated to use UserService\n- /app/project/flockdesk/shared/widgets/avatar_widget.py - Updated to use UserService\n\n### Schema/Model Files\n- /app/project/flockdesk/shared/schemas/user_profile.py - User profile schema\n- /app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/model/user_status.py - User status model\n\n### Test Files\n- /app/project/tests/unit/core/test_user_service.py - NEW comprehensive test file for UserService\n- /app/project/tests/integration/test_profile_sync.py - Updated to work with new architecture\n- /app/project/tests/conftest.py - Fixed markdown code fences issue\n\n## Code Evidence\n\n### New UserService Class (created at flockdesk/core/services/user_service.py)\n```python\n# File: /tmp/project_copy/flockdesk/core/services/user_service.py\n# Lines: 1-100\n\n\"\"\"\nFlockDesk \u2013 Social Workspace Orchestrator\ncore.services.user_service\n\nThis module provides the unified \"UserService\" that consolidates all user-related\nfunctionality previously split between ProfileService and PresenceService. It serves\nas the single source of truth for all user data in the FlockDesk application.\n\nThe service manages:\n1. Static profile data (name, username, avatar, preferences, layout)\n2. Dynamic presence/status data (online/away/dnd/offline states)\n3. Local persistence with remote cloud sync\n4. Event-bus integration for reactive updates\n\"\"\"\n\nclass UserService:\n    \"\"\"\n    Unified service for all user-related functionality.\n\n    Consolidates the previous ProfileService and PresenceService into a single\n    source of truth for user data, managing both static profile information\n    and dynamic presence/status data.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        event_bus: EventBusProtocol,\n        user_id: str,\n        *,\n        storage: Optional[StorageProvider] = None,\n        remote_endpoint: str = DEFAULT_CLOUD_ENDPOINT,\n        sync_interval_s: int = 120,\n        max_backoff_s: int = 10 * 60,\n        session: Any = None,\n        idle_provider: Optional[Callable[[], float]] = None,\n    ) -> None:\n        ...\n\n    # Profile API (from ProfileService)\n    def get_current_user_profile(self) -> UserProfile: ...\n    def save(self, profile: UserProfile, *, broadcast: bool = True) -> None: ...\n    def update_preferences(self, **kwargs: Any) -> None: ...\n    def register_listener(self, fn: Callable[[UserProfile], None]) -> Callable[[], None]: ...\n\n    # Presence API (from PresenceService)\n    def get_presence(self, user_id: str) -> Optional[PresenceInfo]: ...\n    async def set_status(self, state: str, *, metadata: Optional[Dict] = None) -> None: ...\n    def set_status_sync(self, state: str, *, metadata: Optional[Dict] = None) -> None: ...\n    def observe_user_status(self, user_id: str, callback: Callable) -> Callable[[], None]: ...\n\n    # Unified View API (NEW)\n    def get_user_view(self, user_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]: ...\n    def get_all_users(self) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]: ...\n```\n\n### Updated PresenceViewModel (flockdesk/modules/presence/viewmodel/presence_vm.py)\n```python\n# File: /tmp/project_copy/flockdesk/modules/presence/viewmodel/presence_vm.py\n# Lines: 258-271\n\nclass PresenceViewModel(QtCore.QObject):\n    \"\"\"\n    Updated to optionally use the unified UserService for user data.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        bus: EventBus | None = None,\n        *,\n        current_user_id: Optional[str] = None,\n        user_service: Optional[\"UserService\"] = None,  # NEW parameter\n        parent: Optional[QtCore.QObject] = None,\n    ):\n        ...\n        self._user_service = user_service\n\n    def update_from_user_service(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Update the roster from the UserService.\"\"\"\n        if not self._user_service:\n            return\n        for user_view in self._user_service.get_all_users():\n            ...\n```\n\n### Updated AvatarWidget (flockdesk/shared/widgets/avatar_widget.py)\n```python\n# File: /tmp/project_copy/flockdesk/shared/widgets/avatar_widget.py\n# Lines: 197-229\n\nclass AvatarWidget(QWidget):\n    \"\"\"Updated to optionally integrate with the unified UserService.\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        user_id: str,\n        *,\n        size: int | None = None,\n        event_bus: Optional[EventBus] = None,\n        theme_manager: Optional[ThemeManager] = None,\n        user_service: Optional[\"UserService\"] = None,  # NEW parameter\n        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,\n    ) -> None:\n        ...\n        self._user_service = user_service\n\n        # If we have a UserService, load initial data from it\n        if self._user_service:\n            self._load_from_user_service()\n```\n\n### New Unit Tests (tests/unit/core/test_user_service.py)\n```python\n# File: /tmp/project_copy/tests/unit/core/test_user_service.py\n# Lines: 1-50\n\n\"\"\"\nUnit tests for the unified UserService that consolidates ProfileService and\nPresenceService functionality into a single source of truth for user data.\n\"\"\"\n\nclass TestUserServiceProfile:\n    \"\"\"Tests for profile-related functionality (formerly ProfileService).\"\"\"\n    def test_creates_blank_profile_for_new_user(self): ...\n    def test_loads_existing_profile(self): ...\n    def test_save_profile_persists_and_broadcasts(self): ...\n    def test_update_preferences(self): ...\n    def test_register_listener_receives_updates(self): ...\n\nclass TestUserServicePresence:\n    \"\"\"Tests for presence-related functionality (formerly PresenceService).\"\"\"\n    def test_initial_presence_is_offline(self): ...\n    def test_start_sets_online_status(self): ...\n    def test_stop_sets_offline_status(self): ...\n    def test_set_status_sync(self): ...\n\nclass TestUserServiceUnifiedView:\n    \"\"\"Tests for the unified get_user_view API.\"\"\"\n    def test_get_user_view_current_user(self): ...\n    def test_get_user_view_other_user(self): ...\n    def test_get_all_users(self): ...\n```\n\n## Analysis\n\n### Original Architecture Problems\n\nThe original architecture had user-related data fragmented across two distinct services:\n\n1. **ProfileService** (`flockdesk/core/services/profile_service.py`):\n   - Managed static user data: name, username, avatar, preferences, layout\n   - Handled local persistence and cloud synchronization\n   - Published events on `profile/updated` topic\n\n2. **PresenceService** (`flockdesk/modules/presence/service.py`):\n   - Managed dynamic real-time data: online/away/dnd/offline status\n   - Implemented idle detection and heartbeat publishing\n   - Published events on `presence.updated` topic\n\n### Issues with Original Architecture\n- Components needing complete user view had to interact with two different services\n- Risk of data inconsistency between profile and presence states\n- Increased coupling and complexity in consumer components\n- Difficult to maintain a coherent user state across the application\n\n### Solution Design\n\nThe new **UserService** consolidates both services into a single source of truth:\n\n1. **Data Model Unification**:\n   - `UserProfile` dataclass combines static profile fields with presence fields\n   - `PresenceInfo` for event-bus communication of status changes\n   - `PresenceState` enum for valid status values\n\n2. **Unified API**:\n   - `get_user_view(user_id)` - Returns complete user data (profile + presence)\n   - `get_all_users()` - Returns views for all known users\n   - Profile methods: `get_current_user_profile()`, `save()`, `update_preferences()`\n   - Presence methods: `set_status()`, `get_presence()`, `observe_user_status()`\n\n3. **Lifecycle Management**:\n   - `start()` / `stop()` - Controls sync threads and presence broadcasting\n   - `start_async()` / `stop_async()` - For async presence tasks\n\n4. **Event Bus Integration**:\n   - Subscribes to `profile/refresh`, `presence.updated`, `user/updated`\n   - Publishes `profile/updated` and `presence.updated` events\n   - Maintains backwards compatibility with existing event consumers\n\n### Consumer Updates\n\nAll consumer components were updated to optionally accept a `user_service` parameter:\n- **PresenceViewModel**: Can now bootstrap roster from UserService\n- **PresenceWidget**: Integrates with UserService for initial data\n- **AvatarWidget**: Loads avatar and presence from UserService\n\nThese updates maintain backwards compatibility - components work without UserService by falling back to event-bus subscriptions.\n\n## Implementation\n\n### Files Created:\n1. `/app/project/flockdesk/core/services/user_service.py` - 560+ lines, unified service implementation\n\n### Files Modified:\n1. `/app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/main.py` - Updated to use UserService\n2. `/app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/viewmodel/presence_vm.py` - Added UserService integration\n3. `/app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/view/presence_widget.py` - Added UserService integration\n4. `/app/project/flockdesk/shared/widgets/avatar_widget.py` - Added UserService integration\n5. `/app/project/tests/conftest.py` - Fixed markdown code fence issue\n6. `/app/project/tests/integration/test_profile_sync.py` - Updated for new architecture\n\n### Files Deleted:\n1. `/app/project/flockdesk/core/services/profile_service.py` - Replaced by UserService\n2. `/app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/service.py` - Replaced by UserService\n\n### Test Files Created:\n1. `/app/project/tests/unit/core/test_user_service.py` - 17 comprehensive tests\n2. `/app/project/pytest.ini` - Pytest asyncio configuration\n\n### Test Results:\n- **17 unit tests for UserService** - ALL PASSED\n- **3 integration tests** - ALL PASSED\n\n## Summary\n\n- **Primary finding**: Successfully unified ProfileService and PresenceService into a single UserService class, creating a single source of truth for all user-related data in the FlockDesk application.\n\n- **Key components**:\n  - `UserService` - New unified service (flockdesk/core/services/user_service.py)\n  - `UserProfile` - Consolidated data model with profile + presence fields\n  - `get_user_view()` - Key unified API method returning combined user data\n  - Updated consumers: PresenceViewModel, PresenceWidget, AvatarWidget\n\n- **Architectural pattern**:\n  - Single Source of Truth pattern for user data management\n  - Dependency Injection for service consumers\n  - Event-bus integration for reactive updates\n  - Backwards-compatible optional integration\n\n- **Recommendations**:\n  - Continue using UserService as the authoritative source for all user data\n  - Gradually migrate remaining components to use UserService directly\n  - Consider adding caching layer for remote user data\n  - Implement proper error handling for network failures during sync\n",
  "file_path": "/logs/agent/solution.md"

{
  "content": "# Solution: python_desktop_development_expert_021_cross_file_refactoring_expert_01\n\n## Key Files Identified\n\n### Service Files\n- /app/project/flockdesk/core/services/profile_service.py - Original ProfileService managing static user data (DELETED)\n- /app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/service.py - Original PresenceService managing dynamic status data (DELETED)\n- /app/project/flockdesk/core/services/user_service.py - NEW unified UserService replacing both services\n\n### Consumer Files Updated\n- /app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/main.py - Updated to use UserService\n- /app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/viewmodel/presence_vm.py - Updated to use UserService\n- /app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/view/presence_widget.py - Updated to use UserService\n- /app/project/flockdesk/shared/widgets/avatar_widget.py - Updated to use UserService\n\n### Schema/Model Files\n- /app/project/flockdesk/shared/schemas/user_profile.py - User profile schema\n- /app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/model/user_status.py - User status model\n\n### Test Files\n- /app/project/tests/unit/core/test_user_service.py - NEW comprehensive test file for UserService\n- /app/project/tests/integration/test_profile_sync.py - Updated to work with new architecture\n- /app/project/tests/conftest.py - Fixed markdown code fences issue\n\n## Code Evidence\n\n### New UserService Class (created at flockdesk/core/services/user_service.py)\n```python\n# File: /tmp/project_copy/flockdesk/core/services/user_service.py\n# Lines: 1-100\n\n\"\"\"\nFlockDesk \u2013 Social Workspace Orchestrator\ncore.services.user_service\n\nThis module provides the unified \"UserService\" that consolidates all user-related\nfunctionality previously split between ProfileService and PresenceService. It serves\nas the single source of truth for all user data in the FlockDesk application.\n\nThe service manages:\n1. Static profile data (name, username, avatar, preferences, layout)\n2. Dynamic presence/status data (online/away/dnd/offline states)\n3. Local persistence with remote cloud sync\n4. Event-bus integration for reactive updates\n\"\"\"\n\nclass UserService:\n    \"\"\"\n    Unified service for all user-related functionality.\n\n    Consolidates the previous ProfileService and PresenceService into a single\n    source of truth for user data, managing both static profile information\n    and dynamic presence/status data.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        event_bus: EventBusProtocol,\n        user_id: str,\n        *,\n        storage: Optional[StorageProvider] = None,\n        remote_endpoint: str = DEFAULT_CLOUD_ENDPOINT,\n        sync_interval_s: int = 120,\n        max_backoff_s: int = 10 * 60,\n        session: Any = None,\n        idle_provider: Optional[Callable[[], float]] = None,\n    ) -> None:\n        ...\n\n    # Profile API (from ProfileService)\n    def get_current_user_profile(self) -> UserProfile: ...\n    def save(self, profile: UserProfile, *, broadcast: bool = True) -> None: ...\n    def update_preferences(self, **kwargs: Any) -> None: ...\n    def register_listener(self, fn: Callable[[UserProfile], None]) -> Callable[[], None]: ...\n\n    # Presence API (from PresenceService)\n    def get_presence(self, user_id: str) -> Optional[PresenceInfo]: ...\n    async def set_status(self, state: str, *, metadata: Optional[Dict] = None) -> None: ...\n    def set_status_sync(self, state: str, *, metadata: Optional[Dict] = None) -> None: ...\n    def observe_user_status(self, user_id: str, callback: Callable) -> Callable[[], None]: ...\n\n    # Unified View API (NEW)\n    def get_user_view(self, user_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]: ...\n    def get_all_users(self) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]: ...\n```\n\n### Updated PresenceViewModel (flockdesk/modules/presence/viewmodel/presence_vm.py)\n```python\n# File: /tmp/project_copy/flockdesk/modules/presence/viewmodel/presence_vm.py\n# Lines: 258-271\n\nclass PresenceViewModel(QtCore.QObject):\n    \"\"\"\n    Updated to optionally use the unified UserService for user data.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        bus: EventBus | None = None,\n        *,\n        current_user_id: Optional[str] = None,\n        user_service: Optional[\"UserService\"] = None,  # NEW parameter\n        parent: Optional[QtCore.QObject] = None,\n    ):\n        ...\n        self._user_service = user_service\n\n    def update_from_user_service(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Update the roster from the UserService.\"\"\"\n        if not self._user_service:\n            return\n        for user_view in self._user_service.get_all_users():\n            ...\n```\n\n### Updated AvatarWidget (flockdesk/shared/widgets/avatar_widget.py)\n```python\n# File: /tmp/project_copy/flockdesk/shared/widgets/avatar_widget.py\n# Lines: 197-229\n\nclass AvatarWidget(QWidget):\n    \"\"\"Updated to optionally integrate with the unified UserService.\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        user_id: str,\n        *,\n        size: int | None = None,\n        event_bus: Optional[EventBus] = None,\n        theme_manager: Optional[ThemeManager] = None,\n        user_service: Optional[\"UserService\"] = None,  # NEW parameter\n        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,\n    ) -> None:\n        ...\n        self._user_service = user_service\n\n        # If we have a UserService, load initial data from it\n        if self._user_service:\n            self._load_from_user_service()\n```\n\n### New Unit Tests (tests/unit/core/test_user_service.py)\n```python\n# File: /tmp/project_copy/tests/unit/core/test_user_service.py\n# Lines: 1-50\n\n\"\"\"\nUnit tests for the unified UserService that consolidates ProfileService and\nPresenceService functionality into a single source of truth for user data.\n\"\"\"\n\nclass TestUserServiceProfile:\n    \"\"\"Tests for profile-related functionality (formerly ProfileService).\"\"\"\n    def test_creates_blank_profile_for_new_user(self): ...\n    def test_loads_existing_profile(self): ...\n    def test_save_profile_persists_and_broadcasts(self): ...\n    def test_update_preferences(self): ...\n    def test_register_listener_receives_updates(self): ...\n\nclass TestUserServicePresence:\n    \"\"\"Tests for presence-related functionality (formerly PresenceService).\"\"\"\n    def test_initial_presence_is_offline(self): ...\n    def test_start_sets_online_status(self): ...\n    def test_stop_sets_offline_status(self): ...\n    def test_set_status_sync(self): ...\n\nclass TestUserServiceUnifiedView:\n    \"\"\"Tests for the unified get_user_view API.\"\"\"\n    def test_get_user_view_current_user(self): ...\n    def test_get_user_view_other_user(self): ...\n    def test_get_all_users(self): ...\n```\n\n## Analysis\n\n### Original Architecture Problems\n\nThe original architecture had user-related data fragmented across two distinct services:\n\n1. **ProfileService** (`flockdesk/core/services/profile_service.py`):\n   - Managed static user data: name, username, avatar, preferences, layout\n   - Handled local persistence and cloud synchronization\n   - Published events on `profile/updated` topic\n\n2. **PresenceService** (`flockdesk/modules/presence/service.py`):\n   - Managed dynamic real-time data: online/away/dnd/offline status\n   - Implemented idle detection and heartbeat publishing\n   - Published events on `presence.updated` topic\n\n### Issues with Original Architecture\n- Components needing complete user view had to interact with two different services\n- Risk of data inconsistency between profile and presence states\n- Increased coupling and complexity in consumer components\n- Difficult to maintain a coherent user state across the application\n\n### Solution Design\n\nThe new **UserService** consolidates both services into a single source of truth:\n\n1. **Data Model Unification**:\n   - `UserProfile` dataclass combines static profile fields with presence fields\n   - `PresenceInfo` for event-bus communication of status changes\n   - `PresenceState` enum for valid status values\n\n2. **Unified API**:\n   - `get_user_view(user_id)` - Returns complete user data (profile + presence)\n   - `get_all_users()` - Returns views for all known users\n   - Profile methods: `get_current_user_profile()`, `save()`, `update_preferences()`\n   - Presence methods: `set_status()`, `get_presence()`, `observe_user_status()`\n\n3. **Lifecycle Management**:\n   - `start()` / `stop()` - Controls sync threads and presence broadcasting\n   - `start_async()` / `stop_async()` - For async presence tasks\n\n4. **Event Bus Integration**:\n   - Subscribes to `profile/refresh`, `presence.updated`, `user/updated`\n   - Publishes `profile/updated` and `presence.updated` events\n   - Maintains backwards compatibility with existing event consumers\n\n### Consumer Updates\n\nAll consumer components were updated to optionally accept a `user_service` parameter:\n- **PresenceViewModel**: Can now bootstrap roster from UserService\n- **PresenceWidget**: Integrates with UserService for initial data\n- **AvatarWidget**: Loads avatar and presence from UserService\n\nThese updates maintain backwards compatibility - components work without UserService by falling back to event-bus subscriptions.\n\n## Implementation\n\n### Files Created:\n1. `/app/project/flockdesk/core/services/user_service.py` - 560+ lines, unified service implementation\n\n### Files Modified:\n1. `/app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/main.py` - Updated to use UserService\n2. `/app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/viewmodel/presence_vm.py` - Added UserService integration\n3. `/app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/view/presence_widget.py` - Added UserService integration\n4. `/app/project/flockdesk/shared/widgets/avatar_widget.py` - Added UserService integration\n5. `/app/project/tests/conftest.py` - Fixed markdown code fence issue\n6. `/app/project/tests/integration/test_profile_sync.py` - Updated for new architecture\n\n### Files Deleted:\n1. `/app/project/flockdesk/core/services/profile_service.py` - Replaced by UserService\n2. `/app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/service.py` - Replaced by UserService\n\n### Test Files Created:\n1. `/app/project/tests/unit/core/test_user_service.py` - 17 comprehensive tests\n2. `/app/project/pytest.ini` - Pytest asyncio configuration\n\n### Test Results:\n- **17 unit tests for UserService** - ALL PASSED\n- **3 integration tests** - ALL PASSED\n\n## Summary\n\n- **Primary finding**: Successfully unified ProfileService and PresenceService into a single UserService class, creating a single source of truth for all user-related data in the FlockDesk application.\n\n- **Key components**:\n  - `UserService` - New unified service (flockdesk/core/services/user_service.py)\n  - `UserProfile` - Consolidated data model with profile + presence fields\n  - `get_user_view()` - Key unified API method returning combined user data\n  - Updated consumers: PresenceViewModel, PresenceWidget, AvatarWidget\n\n- **Architectural pattern**:\n  - Single Source of Truth pattern for user data management\n  - Dependency Injection for service consumers\n  - Event-bus integration for reactive updates\n  - Backwards-compatible optional integration\n\n- **Recommendations**:\n  - Continue using UserService as the authoritative source for all user data\n  - Gradually migrate remaining components to use UserService directly\n  - Consider adding caching layer for remote user data\n  - Implement proper error handling for network failures during sync\n",
