Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "\"\"\"\nFlockDesk \u2013 Social Workspace Orchestrator\ncore.services.user_service\n\nThis module provides the unified \"UserService\" that consolidates all user-related\nfunctionality previously split between ProfileService and PresenceService. It serves\nas the single source of truth for all user data in the FlockDesk application.\n\nThe service manages:\n1. Static profile data (name, username, avatar, preferences, layout)\n2. Dynamic presence/status data (online/away/dnd/offline states)\n3. Local persistence with remote cloud sync\n4. Event-bus integration for reactive updates\n\nThis consolidation simplifies the architecture by providing a single point of\naccess for components needing user information, reducing coupling and ensuring\ndata consistency.\n\nTypical usage\n-------------\n```python\nfrom flockdesk.core.services.user_service import UserService\n\nuser_service = UserService(event_bus, user_id=\"42\")\nuser_service.start()\n\n# Get complete user view (profile + status)\nview = user_service.get_user_view(\"42\")\nprint(view[\"display_name\"], view[\"status\"])\n\n# Update preferences\nuser_service.update_preferences(theme=\"dark\")\n\n# Set presence status\nawait user_service.set_status(\"dnd\", metadata={\"reason\": \"In a meeting\"})\n```\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport asyncio\nimport json\nimport logging\nimport pathlib\nimport threading\nimport time\nfrom dataclasses import asdict, dataclass, field\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta\nfrom typing import Any, Callable, Dict, List, MutableMapping, Optional, Protocol\n\ntry:\n    import requests\nexcept ImportError:\n    requests = None  # type: ignore\n\nLOG = logging.getLogger(__name__)\nDEFAULT_CLOUD_ENDPOINT = \"https://api.flockdesk.cloud/v1/profile\"\n\n_JSON_INDENT = 2  # pretty-print profile on disk for human readability\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n# Event Bus Protocol\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\nclass EventBusProtocol(Protocol):\n    \"\"\"\n    A minimal protocol for event-bus implementations.\n    Allows the UserService to remain transport-agnostic.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def subscribe(self, topic: str, handler: Callable[..., Any]) -> None:\n        ...\n\n    def publish(self, topic_or_event: Any, payload: Any = None, **kwargs: Any) -> None:\n        ...\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n# Data Models\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\nclass PresenceState:\n    \"\"\"Enumeration of all presence states supported by FlockDesk.\"\"\"\n\n    ONLINE = \"online\"\n    AWAY = \"away\"\n    DND = \"dnd\"  # Do-Not-Disturb\n    OFFLINE = \"offline\"\n\n    @classmethod\n    def is_valid(cls, state: str) -> bool:\n        return state in (cls.ONLINE, cls.AWAY, cls.DND, cls.OFFLINE)\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass UserProfile:\n    \"\"\"Serializable user profile document.\n\n    Contains both static profile data and presence information.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    user_id: str\n    username: str\n    display_name: str = \"\"\n    avatar_path: Optional[str] = None\n    preferences: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)\n    layout: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)\n    last_updated_ts: float = field(default_factory=lambda: time.time())\n    extra: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)\n    # Presence fields\n    status: str = field(default=PresenceState.OFFLINE)\n    status_message: str = \"\"\n    status_updated_at: datetime = field(default_factory=datetime.utcnow)\n    status_metadata: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)\n\n    @classmethod\n    def from_json(cls, data: MutableMapping[str, Any]) -> \"UserProfile\":\n        \"\"\"Create a UserProfile from a JSON-decoded dict.\"\"\"\n        status_updated = data.get(\"status_updated_at\")\n        if isinstance(status_updated, str):\n            status_updated = datetime.fromisoformat(status_updated)\n        elif status_updated is None:\n            status_updated = datetime.utcnow()\n\n        return cls(\n            user_id=data[\"user_id\"],\n            username=data.get(\"username\", \"\"),\n            display_name=data.get(\"display_name\", data.get(\"username\", \"\")),\n            avatar_path=data.get(\"avatar_path\"),\n            preferences=data.get(\"preferences\", {}),\n            layout=data.get(\"layout\", {}),\n            last_updated_ts=data.get(\"last_updated_ts\", time.time()),\n            extra=data.get(\"extra\", {}),\n            status=data.get(\"status\", PresenceState.OFFLINE),\n            status_message=data.get(\"status_message\", \"\"),\n            status_updated_at=status_updated,\n            status_metadata=data.get(\"status_metadata\", {}),\n        )\n\n    def to_json(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"Return a JSON-serialisable mapping.\"\"\"\n        data = asdict(self)\n        data[\"status_updated_at\"] = self.status_updated_at.isoformat()\n        return data\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass PresenceInfo:\n    \"\"\"\n    Canonical presence payload for event-bus communication.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    user_id: str\n    state: str\n    updated_at: datetime = field(default_factory=datetime.utcnow)\n    metadata: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)\n\n    def to_json(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        return {\n            \"user_id\": self.user_id,\n            \"state\": self.state,\n            \"updated_at\": self.updated_at.isoformat(),\n            \"metadata\": self.metadata,\n        }\n\n    @classmethod\n    def from_json(cls, raw: Dict[str, Any]) -> \"PresenceInfo\":\n        return cls(\n            user_id=raw[\"user_id\"],\n            state=raw[\"state\"],\n            updated_at=datetime.fromisoformat(raw[\"updated_at\"]),\n            metadata=raw.get(\"metadata\", {}),\n        )\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n# Storage Provider\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\nclass StorageProvider:\n    \"\"\"Simple JSON-file storage for user profiles.\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, base_path: Optional[pathlib.Path] = None) -> None:\n        self._base_path = (\n            base_path if base_path is not None else pathlib.Path.home() / \".config\" / \"FlockDesk\"\n        )\n        self._base_path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n\n    def load(self, user_id: str) -> Optional[UserProfile]:\n        path = self._file_path(user_id)\n        if not path.exists():\n            return None\n        try:\n            data = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n            return UserProfile.from_json(data)\n        except Exception:\n            LOG.exception(\"Failed to load profile from disk: %s\", path)\n            return None\n\n    def save(self, profile: UserProfile) -> None:\n        path = self._file_path(profile.user_id)\n        try:\n            path.write_text(\n                json.dumps(profile.to_json(), indent=_JSON_INDENT),\n                encoding=\"utf-8\",\n            )\n        except Exception:\n            LOG.exception(\"Failed to save profile to disk: %s\", path)\n\n    def _file_path(self, user_id: str) -> pathlib.Path:\n        return self._base_path / f\"profile_{user_id}.json\"\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n# User Service\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\nclass UserService:\n    \"\"\"\n    Unified service for all user-related functionality.\n\n    Consolidates the previous ProfileService and PresenceService into a single\n    source of truth for user data, managing both static profile information\n    and dynamic presence/status data.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL = timedelta(seconds=30)\n    IDLE_THRESHOLD = timedelta(minutes=5)\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        event_bus: EventBusProtocol,\n        user_id: str,\n        *,\n        storage: Optional[StorageProvider] = None,\n        remote_endpoint: str = DEFAULT_CLOUD_ENDPOINT,\n        sync_interval_s: int = 120,\n        max_backoff_s: int = 10 * 60,\n        session: Any = None,\n        idle_provider: Optional[Callable[[], float]] = None,\n    ) -> None:\n        self._bus = event_bus\n        self._user_id = user_id\n        self._storage = storage or StorageProvider()\n        self._remote_endpoint = remote_endpoint.rstrip(\"/\")\n        self._sync_interval = max(15, sync_interval_s)\n        self._max_backoff = max_backoff_s\n        self._session = session or (requests.Session() if requests else None)\n        self._idle_provider = idle_provider or self._default_idle_provider\n        self._lock = threading.RLock()\n\n        # Profile listeners\n        self._profile_listeners: List[Callable[[UserProfile], None]] = []\n\n        # Presence registry for all known users\n        self._presence_registry: MutableMapping[str, PresenceInfo] = {}\n\n        # Current user's profile (combines static + dynamic data)\n        self._profile: UserProfile = (\n            self._storage.load(user_id) or self._initialise_blank_profile()\n        )\n\n        # Local presence state\n        self._local_state: str = PresenceState.ONLINE\n        self._override_state: Optional[str] = None\n\n        # Sync thread\n        self._sync_thread = threading.Thread(\n            target=self._sync_loop,\n            name=\"FlockDeskUserSync\",\n            daemon=True,\n        )\n        self._stop_event = threading.Event()\n\n        # Async tasks for presence\n        self._async_tasks: List[asyncio.Task[Any]] = []\n        self._async_stop_event: Optional[asyncio.Event] = None\n\n        # Subscribe to events\n        self._bus.subscribe(\"profile/refresh\", self._on_profile_refresh)\n        self._bus.subscribe(\"presence.updated\", self._on_presence_updated)\n        self._bus.subscribe(\"user/updated\", self._on_user_updated)\n\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n    # Lifecycle\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\n    def start(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Start background sync and presence loops.\"\"\"\n        if not self._sync_thread.is_alive():\n            LOG.debug(\"Starting UserService for user %s\", self._user_id)\n            self._sync_thread.start()\n\n        # Set initial presence to online\n        self._local_state = PresenceState.ONLINE\n        self._profile.status = PresenceState.ONLINE\n        self._profile.status_updated_at = datetime.utcnow()\n        self._storage.save(self._profile)\n        self._broadcast_presence()\n\n    def stop(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Signal background threads to terminate and wait for completion.\"\"\"\n        LOG.debug(\"Stopping UserService for user %s\", self._user_id)\n        self._stop_event.set()\n\n        # Set offline status before stopping\n        self._local_state = PresenceState.OFFLINE\n        self._profile.status = PresenceState.OFFLINE\n        self._profile.status_updated_at = datetime.utcnow()\n        self._storage.save(self._profile)\n        self._broadcast_presence()\n\n        if self._sync_thread.is_alive():\n            self._sync_thread.join(timeout=5)\n\n    async def start_async(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Start async presence tasks (watchdog + heartbeat).\"\"\"\n        self._async_stop_event = asyncio.Event()\n        loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()\n        self._async_tasks.append(loop.create_task(self._activity_watchdog()))\n        self._async_tasks.append(loop.create_task(self._heartbeat_publisher()))\n\n    async def stop_async(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Stop async presence tasks.\"\"\"\n        if self._async_stop_event:\n            self._async_stop_event.set()\n        for task in self._async_tasks:\n            task.cancel()\n        self._async_tasks.clear()\n\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n    # Profile API (from ProfileService)\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\n    @property\n    def profile(self) -> UserProfile:\n        \"\"\"Get the current user's complete profile.\"\"\"\n        with self._lock:\n            return self._profile\n\n    @property\n    def user_id(self) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Get the current user's ID.\"\"\"\n        return self._user_id\n\n    def get_current_user_profile(self) -> UserProfile:\n        \"\"\"Get the current user's profile (alias for profile property).\"\"\"\n        return self.profile\n\n    def save(self, profile: UserProfile, *, broadcast: bool = True) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Persist and broadcast a profile that has been modified in-memory.\"\"\"\n        with self._lock:\n            profile.last_updated_ts = time.time()\n            self._profile = profile\n            self._storage.save(profile)\n\n        if broadcast:\n            self._publish_profile_updated()\n            self._notify_profile_listeners(profile)\n\n    def update_preferences(self, **kwargs: Any) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Convenience helper to modify preferences.\"\"\"\n        with self._lock:\n            self._profile.preferences.update(kwargs)\n            self._profile.last_updated_ts = time.time()\n            self._storage.save(self._profile)\n\n        self._publish_profile_updated()\n        self._notify_profile_listeners(self._profile)\n\n    def register_listener(self, fn: Callable[[UserProfile], None]) -> Callable[[], None]:\n        \"\"\"Register a callback that fires when the profile changes.\n\n        Returns\n        -------\n        Callable[[], None]\n            Unregister function.\n        \"\"\"\n        if fn not in self._profile_listeners:\n            self._profile_listeners.append(fn)\n\n        def _unregister() -> None:\n            try:\n                self._profile_listeners.remove(fn)\n            except ValueError:\n                pass\n\n        return _unregister\n\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n    # Presence API (from PresenceService)\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\n    def get_presence(self, user_id: str) -> Optional[PresenceInfo]:\n        \"\"\"Return the latest presence data for a user.\"\"\"\n        return self._presence_registry.get(user_id)\n\n    async def set_status(\n        self,\n        state: str,\n        *,\n        metadata: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,\n        override: bool = True,\n    ) -> None:\n        \"\"\"\n        Explicitly set the current user's presence status.\n\n        Parameters\n        ----------\n        state:\n            One of PresenceState values (online, away, dnd, offline).\n        metadata:\n            Optional free-form metadata blob.\n        override:\n            If True, automatic idle detection is disabled until\n            clear_manual_override() is called.\n        \"\"\"\n        if not PresenceState.is_valid(state):\n            LOG.warning(\"Invalid presence state: %s\", state)\n            return\n\n        self._override_state = state if override else None\n        await self._broadcast_presence_async(state, metadata or {})\n\n    def set_status_sync(\n        self,\n        state: str,\n        *,\n        metadata: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,\n        override: bool = True,\n    ) -> None:\n        \"\"\"\n        Synchronous version of set_status for non-async contexts.\n        \"\"\"\n        if not PresenceState.is_valid(state):\n            LOG.warning(\"Invalid presence state: %s\", state)\n            return\n\n        self._override_state = state if override else None\n        self._local_state = state\n        self._profile.status = state\n        self._profile.status_updated_at = datetime.utcnow()\n        self._profile.status_metadata = metadata or {}\n        self._storage.save(self._profile)\n        self._broadcast_presence()\n\n    async def clear_manual_override(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Re-enable automatic presence detection.\"\"\"\n        LOG.debug(\"Presence manual override cleared\")\n        self._override_state = None\n        await self._evaluate_local_state()\n\n    def observe_user_status(\n        self, user_id: str, callback: Callable[[PresenceInfo], None]\n    ) -> Callable[[], None]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Register a callback to observe status changes for a specific user.\n\n        Returns an unsubscribe function.\n        \"\"\"\n        # For simplicity, we use the event bus internally\n        # The callback will be invoked when presence.updated events arrive\n        def handler(payload: Any) -> None:\n            try:\n                if hasattr(payload, \"payload\"):\n                    data = payload.payload\n                elif isinstance(payload, dict):\n                    data = payload\n                else:\n                    return\n\n                if data.get(\"user_id\") == user_id:\n                    info = PresenceInfo.from_json(data)\n                    callback(info)\n            except Exception:\n                LOG.exception(\"Error in observe_user_status callback\")\n\n        self._bus.subscribe(\"presence.updated\", handler)\n\n        def unsubscribe() -> None:\n            # Note: actual unsubscription depends on event bus implementation\n            pass\n\n        return unsubscribe\n\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n    # Unified View API\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\n    def get_user_view(self, user_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Get a complete view of a user combining profile and presence data.\n\n        Returns a dictionary with:\n        - user_id: str\n        - username: str\n        - display_name: str\n        - avatar_path: Optional[str]\n        - status: str (presence state)\n        - status_message: str\n        - is_current_user: bool\n        \"\"\"\n        if user_id == self._user_id:\n            # Return current user's full profile\n            with self._lock:\n                return {\n                    \"user_id\": self._profile.user_id,\n                    \"username\": self._profile.username,\n                    \"display_name\": self._profile.display_name or self._profile.username,\n                    \"avatar_path\": self._profile.avatar_path,\n                    \"status\": self._profile.status,\n                    \"status_message\": self._profile.status_message,\n                    \"status_updated_at\": self._profile.status_updated_at.isoformat(),\n                    \"preferences\": self._profile.preferences,\n                    \"is_current_user\": True,\n                }\n        else:\n            # Return what we know about other users from presence registry\n            presence = self._presence_registry.get(user_id)\n            return {\n                \"user_id\": user_id,\n                \"username\": user_id,\n                \"display_name\": presence.metadata.get(\"display_name\", user_id) if presence else user_id,\n                \"avatar_path\": presence.metadata.get(\"avatar_path\") if presence else None,\n                \"status\": presence.state if presence else PresenceState.OFFLINE,\n                \"status_message\": presence.metadata.get(\"message\", \"\") if presence else \"\",\n                \"status_updated_at\": presence.updated_at.isoformat() if presence else None,\n                \"preferences\": {},\n                \"is_current_user\": False,\n            }\n\n    def get_all_users(self) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:\n        \"\"\"Get views of all known users including current user.\"\"\"\n        users = [self.get_user_view(self._user_id)]\n        for user_id in self._presence_registry:\n            if user_id != self._user_id:\n                users.append(self.get_user_view(user_id))\n        return users\n\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n    # Event Handlers\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\n    def _on_profile_refresh(self, event: Any) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Handle 'profile/refresh' emitted by external components.\"\"\"\n        LOG.debug(\"Received profile refresh request\")\n        threading.Thread(\n            target=self._pull_remote, name=\"FlockDeskProfileForcePull\", daemon=True\n        ).start()\n\n    def _on_presence_updated(self, event_or_payload: Any) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Handle presence.updated events from the bus.\"\"\"\n        try:\n            if hasattr(event_or_payload, \"payload\"):\n                data = event_or_payload.payload\n            elif isinstance(event_or_payload, dict):\n                data = event_or_payload\n            else:\n                return\n\n            info = PresenceInfo.from_json(data)\n\n            # Check if this is a newer update\n            current = self._presence_registry.get(info.user_id)\n            if current and info.updated_at <= current.updated_at:\n                return\n\n            self._presence_registry[info.user_id] = info\n            LOG.debug(\"Presence updated: %s -> %s\", info.user_id, info.state)\n\n            # If this is for the current user, update profile too\n            if info.user_id == self._user_id:\n                with self._lock:\n                    self._profile.status = info.state\n                    self._profile.status_updated_at = info.updated_at\n                    self._profile.status_metadata = info.metadata\n        except Exception:\n            LOG.exception(\"Error handling presence event\")\n\n    def _on_user_updated(self, event: Any) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Handle user/updated events.\"\"\"\n        LOG.debug(\"Received user/updated event\")\n\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n    # Internal - Presence Broadcasting\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\n    def _broadcast_presence(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Broadcast current user's presence (synchronous).\"\"\"\n        info = PresenceInfo(\n            user_id=self._user_id,\n            state=self._local_state,\n            metadata={\n                \"display_name\": self._profile.display_name or self._profile.username,\n                \"avatar_path\": self._profile.avatar_path,\n            },\n        )\n        self._presence_registry[self._user_id] = info\n\n        try:\n            # Try to publish - handle both sync and async event bus types\n            result = self._bus.publish(\"presence.updated\", info.to_json())\n            if asyncio.iscoroutine(result):\n                # Create a new event loop if needed for async publish\n                try:\n                    loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()\n                    loop.create_task(result)\n                except RuntimeError:\n                    asyncio.run(result)\n        except Exception:\n            LOG.exception(\"Failed to broadcast presence\")\n\n    async def _broadcast_presence_async(\n        self, state: str, metadata: Dict[str, Any]\n    ) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Broadcast presence update asynchronously.\"\"\"\n        self._local_state = state\n        self._profile.status = state\n        self._profile.status_updated_at = datetime.utcnow()\n        self._profile.status_metadata = metadata\n        self._storage.save(self._profile)\n\n        info = PresenceInfo(\n            user_id=self._user_id,\n            state=state,\n            metadata={\n                \"display_name\": self._profile.display_name or self._profile.username,\n                \"avatar_path\": self._profile.avatar_path,\n                **metadata,\n            },\n        )\n        self._presence_registry[self._user_id] = info\n\n        result = self._bus.publish(\"presence.updated\", info.to_json())\n        if asyncio.iscoroutine(result):\n            await result\n\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n    # Internal - Background Tasks\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\n    async def _activity_watchdog(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Periodically check idle time and update presence.\"\"\"\n        LOG.debug(\"Presence watchdog started\")\n        while self._async_stop_event and not self._async_stop_event.is_set():\n            try:\n                await self._evaluate_local_state()\n            except Exception:\n                LOG.exception(\"Presence watchdog error\")\n            await asyncio.sleep(5)\n        LOG.debug(\"Presence watchdog terminated\")\n\n    async def _heartbeat_publisher(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Send periodic presence heartbeats.\"\"\"\n        LOG.debug(\"Presence heartbeat started\")\n        while self._async_stop_event and not self._async_stop_event.is_set():\n            try:\n                await self._broadcast_presence_async(self._local_state, {})\n            except Exception:\n                LOG.exception(\"Presence heartbeat error\")\n            await asyncio.sleep(self.HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL.total_seconds())\n        LOG.debug(\"Presence heartbeat terminated\")\n\n    async def _evaluate_local_state(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Determine presence state based on idle time and overrides.\"\"\"\n        if self._override_state:\n            state = self._override_state\n        else:\n            idle_seconds = self._idle_provider()\n            state = (\n                PresenceState.AWAY\n                if idle_seconds >= self.IDLE_THRESHOLD.total_seconds()\n                else PresenceState.ONLINE\n            )\n\n        if state != self._local_state:\n            LOG.debug(\"Presence state transition: %s -> %s\", self._local_state, state)\n            await self._broadcast_presence_async(state, {})\n\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n    # Internal - Sync Loop (Profile)\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\n    def _sync_loop(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Background loop for profile sync with exponential backoff.\"\"\"\n        backoff_s = self._sync_interval\n        while not self._stop_event.is_set():\n            start = time.time()\n            try:\n                self._push_local()\n                self._pull_remote()\n                backoff_s = self._sync_interval\n            except Exception:\n                LOG.exception(\"Profile sync failed - backing off\")\n                backoff_s = min(backoff_s * 2, self._max_backoff)\n            finally:\n                elapsed = time.time() - start\n                sleep_time = max(backoff_s - elapsed, 1)\n                self._stop_event.wait(timeout=sleep_time)\n\n    def _push_local(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Push local profile to cloud.\"\"\"\n        if not self._session:\n            return\n\n        with self._lock:\n            payload = self._profile.to_json()\n\n        url = f\"{self._remote_endpoint}/{self._user_id}\"\n        try:\n            res = self._session.put(url, json=payload, timeout=10)\n            res.raise_for_status()\n            LOG.debug(\"Pushed profile to remote (%s)\", res.status_code)\n        except Exception:\n            LOG.warning(\"Failed to push profile to cloud\", exc_info=True)\n            raise\n\n    def _pull_remote(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Pull profile from cloud and merge if newer.\"\"\"\n        if not self._session:\n            return\n\n        url = f\"{self._remote_endpoint}/{self._user_id}\"\n        try:\n            res = self._session.get(url, timeout=10)\n            res.raise_for_status()\n            remote_doc = res.json()\n        except Exception:\n            LOG.info(\"Profile pull skipped - network unavailable\")\n            raise\n\n        remote_profile = UserProfile.from_json(remote_doc)\n        with self._lock:\n            if remote_profile.last_updated_ts > self._profile.last_updated_ts:\n                LOG.debug(\"Remote profile is newer - updating local copy\")\n                self._profile = remote_profile\n                self._storage.save(remote_profile)\n\n        self._publish_profile_updated()\n        self._notify_profile_listeners(remote_profile)\n\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n    # Helpers\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\n    def _publish_profile_updated(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Publish profile update event.\"\"\"\n        try:\n            # Support both Event-based and dict-based event buses\n            from flockdesk.core.app import Event\n            self._bus.publish(Event(\"profile/updated\", payload=self._profile.to_json()))\n        except ImportError:\n            self._bus.publish(\"profile/updated\", self._profile.to_json())\n\n    def _notify_profile_listeners(self, profile: UserProfile) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Invoke registered profile callbacks.\"\"\"\n        def _run(fn: Callable[[UserProfile], None]) -> None:\n            try:\n                fn(profile)\n            except Exception:\n                LOG.exception(\"Profile listener raised\")\n\n        for listener in list(self._profile_listeners):\n            threading.Thread(target=_run, args=(listener,), daemon=True).start()\n\n    def _initialise_blank_profile(self) -> UserProfile:\n        \"\"\"Create a default profile for first-time users.\"\"\"\n        LOG.info(\"Creating new blank profile for user %s\", self._user_id)\n        profile = UserProfile(\n            user_id=self._user_id,\n            username=f\"user-{self._user_id}\",\n            display_name=f\"User {self._user_id}\",\n            preferences={\n                \"theme\": \"light\",\n                \"language\": \"en\",\n            },\n            layout={},\n            extra={},\n            status=PresenceState.OFFLINE,\n        )\n        self._storage.save(profile)\n        return profile\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def _default_idle_provider() -> float:\n        \"\"\"Default idle time provider (returns 0).\"\"\"\n        return 0.0\n",
    "filePath": "/tmp/project_copy/flockdesk/core/services/user_service.py",
    "numLines": 785,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 785
  },
  "type": "text"
}
74. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "\"\"\"\nFlockDesk \u2013 Social Workspace Orchestrator\ncore.services.user_service\n\nThis module provides the unified \"UserService\" that consolidates all user-related\nfunctionality previously split between ProfileService and PresenceService. It serves\nas the single source of truth for all user data in the FlockDesk application.\n\nThe service manages:\n1. Static profile data (name, username, avatar, preferences, layout)\n2. Dynamic presence/status data (online/away/dnd/offline states)\n3. Local persistence with remote cloud sync\n4. Event-bus integration for reactive updates\n\nThis consolidation simplifies the architecture by providing a single point of\naccess for components needing user information, reducing coupling and ensuring\ndata consistency.\n\nTypical usage\n-------------\n```python\nfrom flockdesk.core.services.user_service import UserService\n\nuser_service = UserService(event_bus, user_id=\"42\")\nuser_service.start()\n\n# Get complete user view (profile + status)\nview = user_service.get_user_view(\"42\")\nprint(view[\"display_name\"], view[\"status\"])\n\n# Update preferences\nuser_service.update_preferences(theme=\"dark\")\n\n# Set presence status\nawait user_service.set_status(\"dnd\", metadata={\"reason\": \"In a meeting\"})\n```\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport asyncio\nimport json\nimport logging\nimport pathlib\nimport threading\nimport time\nfrom dataclasses import asdict, dataclass, field\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta\nfrom typing import Any, Callable, Dict, List, MutableMapping, Optional, Protocol\n\ntry:\n    import requests\nexcept ImportError:\n    requests = None  # type: ignore\n\nLOG = logging.getLogger(__name__)\nDEFAULT_CLOUD_ENDPOINT = \"https://api.flockdesk.cloud/v1/profile\"\n\n_JSON_INDENT = 2  # pretty-print profile on disk for human readability\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n# Event Bus Protocol\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\nclass EventBusProtocol(Protocol):\n    \"\"\"\n    A minimal protocol for event-bus implementations.\n    Allows the UserService to remain transport-agnostic.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def subscribe(self, topic: str, handler: Callable[..., Any]) -> None:\n        ...\n\n    def publish(self, topic_or_event: Any, payload: Any = None, **kwargs: Any) -> None:\n        ...\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n# Data Models\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\nclass PresenceState:\n    \"\"\"Enumeration of all presence states supported by FlockDesk.\"\"\"\n\n    ONLINE = \"online\"\n    AWAY = \"away\"\n    DND = \"dnd\"  # Do-Not-Disturb\n    OFFLINE = \"offline\"\n\n    @classmethod\n    def is_valid(cls, state: str) -> bool:\n        return state in (cls.ONLINE, cls.AWAY, cls.DND, cls.OFFLINE)\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass UserProfile:\n    \"\"\"Serializable user profile document.\n\n    Contains both static profile data and presence information.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    user_id: str\n    username: str\n    display_name: str = \"\"\n    avatar_path: Optional[str] = None\n    preferences: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)\n    layout: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)\n    last_updated_ts: float = field(default_factory=lambda: time.time())\n    extra: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)\n    # Presence fields\n    status: str = field(default=PresenceState.OFFLINE)\n    status_message: str = \"\"\n    status_updated_at: datetime = field(default_factory=datetime.utcnow)\n    status_metadata: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)\n\n    @classmethod\n    def from_json(cls, data: MutableMapping[str, Any]) -> \"UserProfile\":\n        \"\"\"Create a UserProfile from a JSON-decoded dict.\"\"\"\n        status_updated = data.get(\"status_updated_at\")\n        if isinstance(status_updated, str):\n            status_updated = datetime.fromisoformat(status_updated)\n        elif status_updated is None:\n            status_updated = datetime.utcnow()\n\n        return cls(\n            user_id=data[\"user_id\"],\n            username=data.get(\"username\", \"\"),\n            display_name=data.get(\"display_name\", data.get(\"username\", \"\")),\n            avatar_path=data.get(\"avatar_path\"),\n            preferences=data.get(\"preferences\", {}),\n            layout=data.get(\"layout\", {}),\n            last_updated_ts=data.get(\"last_updated_ts\", time.time()),\n            extra=data.get(\"extra\", {}),\n            status=data.get(\"status\", PresenceState.OFFLINE),\n            status_message=data.get(\"status_message\", \"\"),\n            status_updated_at=status_updated,\n            status_metadata=data.get(\"status_metadata\", {}),\n        )\n\n    def to_json(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"Return a JSON-serialisable mapping.\"\"\"\n        data = asdict(self)\n        data[\"status_updated_at\"] = self.status_updated_at.isoformat()\n        return data\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass PresenceInfo:\n    \"\"\"\n    Canonical presence payload for event-bus communication.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    user_id: str\n    state: str\n    updated_at: datetime = field(default_factory=datetime.utcnow)\n    metadata: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)\n\n    def to_json(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        return {\n            \"user_id\": self.user_id,\n            \"state\": self.state,\n            \"updated_at\": self.updated_at.isoformat(),\n            \"metadata\": self.metadata,\n        }\n\n    @classmethod\n    def from_json(cls, raw: Dict[str, Any]) -> \"PresenceInfo\":\n        return cls(\n            user_id=raw[\"user_id\"],\n            state=raw[\"state\"],\n            updated_at=datetime.fromisoformat(raw[\"updated_at\"]),\n            metadata=raw.get(\"metadata\", {}),\n        )\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n# Storage Provider\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\nclass StorageProvider:\n    \"\"\"Simple JSON-file storage for user profiles.\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, base_path: Optional[pathlib.Path] = None) -> None:\n        self._base_path = (\n            base_path if base_path is not None else pathlib.Path.home() / \".config\" / \"FlockDesk\"\n        )\n        self._base_path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n\n    def load(self, user_id: str) -> Optional[UserProfile]:\n        path = self._file_path(user_id)\n        if not path.exists():\n            return None\n        try:\n            data = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n            return UserProfile.from_json(data)\n        except Exception:\n            LOG.exception(\"Failed to load profile from disk: %s\", path)\n            return None\n\n    def save(self, profile: UserProfile) -> None:\n        path = self._file_path(profile.user_id)\n        try:\n            path.write_text(\n                json.dumps(profile.to_json(), indent=_JSON_INDENT),\n                encoding=\"utf-8\",\n            )\n        except Exception:\n            LOG.exception(\"Failed to save profile to disk: %s\", path)\n\n    def _file_path(self, user_id: str) -> pathlib.Path:\n        return self._base_path / f\"profile_{user_id}.json\"\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n# User Service\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\nclass UserService:\n    \"\"\"\n    Unified service for all user-related functionality.\n\n    Consolidates the previous ProfileService and PresenceService into a single\n    source of truth for user data, managing both static profile information\n    and dynamic presence/status data.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL = timedelta(seconds=30)\n    IDLE_THRESHOLD = timedelta(minutes=5)\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        event_bus: EventBusProtocol,\n        user_id: str,\n        *,\n        storage: Optional[StorageProvider] = None,\n        remote_endpoint: str = DEFAULT_CLOUD_ENDPOINT,\n        sync_interval_s: int = 120,\n        max_backoff_s: int = 10 * 60,\n        session: Any = None,\n        idle_provider: Optional[Callable[[], float]] = None,\n    ) -> None:\n        self._bus = event_bus\n        self._user_id = user_id\n        self._storage = storage or StorageProvider()\n        self._remote_endpoint = remote_endpoint.rstrip(\"/\")\n        self._sync_interval = max(15, sync_interval_s)\n        self._max_backoff = max_backoff_s\n        self._session = session or (requests.Session() if requests else None)\n        self._idle_provider = idle_provider or self._default_idle_provider\n        self._lock = threading.RLock()\n\n        # Profile listeners\n        self._profile_listeners: List[Callable[[UserProfile], None]] = []\n\n        # Presence registry for all known users\n        self._presence_registry: MutableMapping[str, PresenceInfo] = {}\n\n        # Current user's profile (combines static + dynamic data)\n        self._profile: UserProfile = (\n            self._storage.load(user_id) or self._initialise_blank_profile()\n        )\n\n        # Local presence state\n        self._local_state: str = PresenceState.ONLINE\n        self._override_state: Optional[str] = None\n\n        # Sync thread\n        self._sync_thread = threading.Thread(\n            target=self._sync_loop,\n            name=\"FlockDeskUserSync\",\n            daemon=True,\n        )\n        self._stop_event = threading.Event()\n\n        # Async tasks for presence\n        self._async_tasks: List[asyncio.Task[Any]] = []\n        self._async_stop_event: Optional[asyncio.Event] = None\n\n        # Subscribe to events\n        self._bus.subscribe(\"profile/refresh\", self._on_profile_refresh)\n        self._bus.subscribe(\"presence.updated\", self._on_presence_updated)\n        self._bus.subscribe(\"user/updated\", self._on_user_updated)\n\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n    # Lifecycle\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\n    def start(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Start background sync and presence loops.\"\"\"\n        if not self._sync_thread.is_alive():\n            LOG.debug(\"Starting UserService for user %s\", self._user_id)\n            self._sync_thread.start()\n\n        # Set initial presence to online\n        self._local_state = PresenceState.ONLINE\n        self._profile.status = PresenceState.ONLINE\n        self._profile.status_updated_at = datetime.utcnow()\n        self._storage.save(self._profile)\n        self._broadcast_presence()\n\n    def stop(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Signal background threads to terminate and wait for completion.\"\"\"\n        LOG.debug(\"Stopping UserService for user %s\", self._user_id)\n        self._stop_event.set()\n\n        # Set offline status before stopping\n        self._local_state = PresenceState.OFFLINE\n        self._profile.status = PresenceState.OFFLINE\n        self._profile.status_updated_at = datetime.utcnow()\n        self._storage.save(self._profile)\n        self._broadcast_presence()\n\n        if self._sync_thread.is_alive():\n            self._sync_thread.join(timeout=5)\n\n    async def start_async(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Start async presence tasks (watchdog + heartbeat).\"\"\"\n        self._async_stop_event = asyncio.Event()\n        loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()\n        self._async_tasks.append(loop.create_task(self._activity_watchdog()))\n        self._async_tasks.append(loop.create_task(self._heartbeat_publisher()))\n\n    async def stop_async(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Stop async presence tasks.\"\"\"\n        if self._async_stop_event:\n            self._async_stop_event.set()\n        for task in self._async_tasks:\n            task.cancel()\n        self._async_tasks.clear()\n\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n    # Profile API (from ProfileService)\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\n    @property\n    def profile(self) -> UserProfile:\n        \"\"\"Get the current user's complete profile.\"\"\"\n        with self._lock:\n            return self._profile\n\n    @property\n    def user_id(self) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Get the current user's ID.\"\"\"\n        return self._user_id\n\n    def get_current_user_profile(self) -> UserProfile:\n        \"\"\"Get the current user's profile (alias for profile property).\"\"\"\n        return self.profile\n\n    def save(self, profile: UserProfile, *, broadcast: bool = True) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Persist and broadcast a profile that has been modified in-memory.\"\"\"\n        with self._lock:\n            profile.last_updated_ts = time.time()\n            self._profile = profile\n            self._storage.save(profile)\n\n        if broadcast:\n            self._publish_profile_updated()\n            self._notify_profile_listeners(profile)\n\n    def update_preferences(self, **kwargs: Any) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Convenience helper to modify preferences.\"\"\"\n        with self._lock:\n            self._profile.preferences.update(kwargs)\n            self._profile.last_updated_ts = time.time()\n            self._storage.save(self._profile)\n\n        self._publish_profile_updated()\n        self._notify_profile_listeners(self._profile)\n\n    def register_listener(self, fn: Callable[[UserProfile], None]) -> Callable[[], None]:\n        \"\"\"Register a callback that fires when the profile changes.\n\n        Returns\n        -------\n        Callable[[], None]\n            Unregister function.\n        \"\"\"\n        if fn not in self._profile_listeners:\n            self._profile_listeners.append(fn)\n\n        def _unregister() -> None:\n            try:\n                self._profile_listeners.remove(fn)\n            except ValueError:\n                pass\n\n        return _unregister\n\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n    # Presence API (from PresenceService)\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\n    def get_presence(self, user_id: str) -> Optional[PresenceInfo]:\n        \"\"\"Return the latest presence data for a user.\"\"\"\n        return self._presence_registry.get(user_id)\n\n    async def set_status(\n        self,\n        state: str,\n        *,\n        metadata: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,\n        override: bool = True,\n    ) -> None:\n        \"\"\"\n        Explicitly set the current user's presence status.\n\n        Parameters\n        ----------\n        state:\n            One of PresenceState values (online, away, dnd, offline).\n        metadata:\n            Optional free-form metadata blob.\n        override:\n            If True, automatic idle detection is disabled until\n            clear_manual_override() is called.\n        \"\"\"\n        if not PresenceState.is_valid(state):\n            LOG.warning(\"Invalid presence state: %s\", state)\n            return\n\n        self._override_state = state if override else None\n        await self._broadcast_presence_async(state, metadata or {})\n\n    def set_status_sync(\n        self,\n        state: str,\n        *,\n        metadata: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,\n        override: bool = True,\n    ) -> None:\n        \"\"\"\n        Synchronous version of set_status for non-async contexts.\n        \"\"\"\n        if not PresenceState.is_valid(state):\n            LOG.warning(\"Invalid presence state: %s\", state)\n            return\n\n        self._override_state = state if override else None\n        self._local_state = state\n        self._profile.status = state\n        self._profile.status_updated_at = datetime.utcnow()\n        self._profile.status_metadata = metadata or {}\n        self._storage.save(self._profile)\n        self._broadcast_presence()\n\n    async def clear_manual_override(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Re-enable automatic presence detection.\"\"\"\n        LOG.debug(\"Presence manual override cleared\")\n        self._override_state = None\n        await self._evaluate_local_state()\n\n    def observe_user_status(\n        self, user_id: str, callback: Callable[[PresenceInfo], None]\n    ) -> Callable[[], None]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Register a callback to observe status changes for a specific user.\n\n        Returns an unsubscribe function.\n        \"\"\"\n        # For simplicity, we use the event bus internally\n        # The callback will be invoked when presence.updated events arrive\n        def handler(payload: Any) -> None:\n            try:\n                if hasattr(payload, \"payload\"):\n                    data = payload.payload\n                elif isinstance(payload, dict):\n                    data = payload\n                else:\n                    return\n\n                if data.get(\"user_id\") == user_id:\n                    info = PresenceInfo.from_json(data)\n                    callback(info)\n            except Exception:\n                LOG.exception(\"Error in observe_user_status callback\")\n\n        self._bus.subscribe(\"presence.updated\", handler)\n\n        def unsubscribe() -> None:\n            # Note: actual unsubscription depends on event bus implementation\n            pass\n\n        return unsubscribe\n\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n    # Unified View API\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\n    def get_user_view(self, user_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Get a complete view of a user combining profile and presence data.\n\n        Returns a dictionary with:\n        - user_id: str\n        - username: str\n        - display_name: str\n        - avatar_path: Optional[str]\n        - status: str (presence state)\n        - status_message: str\n        - is_current_user: bool\n        \"\"\"\n        if user_id == self._user_id:\n            # Return current user's full profile\n            with self._lock:\n                return {\n                    \"user_id\": self._profile.user_id,\n                    \"username\": self._profile.username,\n                    \"display_name\": self._profile.display_name or self._profile.username,\n                    \"avatar_path\": self._profile.avatar_path,\n                    \"status\": self._profile.status,\n                    \"status_message\": self._profile.status_message,\n                    \"status_updated_at\": self._profile.status_updated_at.isoformat(),\n                    \"preferences\": self._profile.preferences,\n                    \"is_current_user\": True,\n                }\n        else:\n            # Return what we know about other users from presence registry\n            presence = self._presence_registry.get(user_id)\n            return {\n                \"user_id\": user_id,\n                \"username\": user_id,\n                \"display_name\": presence.metadata.get(\"display_name\", user_id) if presence else user_id,\n                \"avatar_path\": presence.metadata.get(\"avatar_path\") if presence else None,\n                \"status\": presence.state if presence else PresenceState.OFFLINE,\n                \"status_message\": presence.metadata.get(\"message\", \"\") if presence else \"\",\n                \"status_updated_at\": presence.updated_at.isoformat() if presence else None,\n                \"preferences\": {},\n                \"is_current_user\": False,\n            }\n\n    def get_all_users(self) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:\n        \"\"\"Get views of all known users including current user.\"\"\"\n        users = [self.get_user_view(self._user_id)]\n        for user_id in self._presence_registry:\n            if user_id != self._user_id:\n                users.append(self.get_user_view(user_id))\n        return users\n\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n    # Event Handlers\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\n    def _on_profile_refresh(self, event: Any) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Handle 'profile/refresh' emitted by external components.\"\"\"\n        LOG.debug(\"Received profile refresh request\")\n        threading.Thread(\n            target=self._pull_remote, name=\"FlockDeskProfileForcePull\", daemon=True\n        ).start()\n\n    def _on_presence_updated(self, event_or_payload: Any) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Handle presence.updated events from the bus.\"\"\"\n        try:\n            if hasattr(event_or_payload, \"payload\"):\n                data = event_or_payload.payload\n            elif isinstance(event_or_payload, dict):\n                data = event_or_payload\n            else:\n                return\n\n            info = PresenceInfo.from_json(data)\n\n            # Check if this is a newer update\n            current = self._presence_registry.get(info.user_id)\n            if current and info.updated_at <= current.updated_at:\n                return\n\n            self._presence_registry[info.user_id] = info\n            LOG.debug(\"Presence updated: %s -> %s\", info.user_id, info.state)\n\n            # If this is for the current user, update profile too\n            if info.user_id == self._user_id:\n                with self._lock:\n                    self._profile.status = info.state\n                    self._profile.status_updated_at = info.updated_at\n                    self._profile.status_metadata = info.metadata\n        except Exception:\n            LOG.exception(\"Error handling presence event\")\n\n    def _on_user_updated(self, event: Any) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Handle user/updated events.\"\"\"\n        LOG.debug(\"Received user/updated event\")\n\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n    # Internal - Presence Broadcasting\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\n    def _broadcast_presence(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Broadcast current user's presence (synchronous).\"\"\"\n        info = PresenceInfo(\n            user_id=self._user_id,\n            state=self._local_state,\n            metadata={\n                \"display_name\": self._profile.display_name or self._profile.username,\n                \"avatar_path\": self._profile.avatar_path,\n            },\n        )\n        self._presence_registry[self._user_id] = info\n\n        try:\n            # Try to publish - handle both sync and async event bus types\n            result = self._bus.publish(\"presence.updated\", info.to_json())\n            if asyncio.iscoroutine(result):\n                # Create a new event loop if needed for async publish\n                try:\n                    loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()\n                    loop.create_task(result)\n                except RuntimeError:\n                    asyncio.run(result)\n        except Exception:\n            LOG.exception(\"Failed to broadcast presence\")\n\n    async def _broadcast_presence_async(\n        self, state: str, metadata: Dict[str, Any]\n    ) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Broadcast presence update asynchronously.\"\"\"\n        self._local_state = state\n        self._profile.status = state\n        self._profile.status_updated_at = datetime.utcnow()\n        self._profile.status_metadata = metadata\n        self._storage.save(self._profile)\n\n        info = PresenceInfo(\n            user_id=self._user_id,\n            state=state,\n            metadata={\n                \"display_name\": self._profile.display_name or self._profile.username,\n                \"avatar_path\": self._profile.avatar_path,\n                **metadata,\n            },\n        )\n        self._presence_registry[self._user_id] = info\n\n        result = self._bus.publish(\"presence.updated\", info.to_json())\n        if asyncio.iscoroutine(result):\n            await result\n\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n    # Internal - Background Tasks\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\n    async def _activity_watchdog(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Periodically check idle time and update presence.\"\"\"\n        LOG.debug(\"Presence watchdog started\")\n        while self._async_stop_event and not self._async_stop_event.is_set():\n            try:\n                await self._evaluate_local_state()\n            except Exception:\n                LOG.exception(\"Presence watchdog error\")\n            await asyncio.sleep(5)\n        LOG.debug(\"Presence watchdog terminated\")\n\n    async def _heartbeat_publisher(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Send periodic presence heartbeats.\"\"\"\n        LOG.debug(\"Presence heartbeat started\")\n        while self._async_stop_event and not self._async_stop_event.is_set():\n            try:\n                await self._broadcast_presence_async(self._local_state, {})\n            except Exception:\n                LOG.exception(\"Presence heartbeat error\")\n            await asyncio.sleep(self.HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL.total_seconds())\n        LOG.debug(\"Presence heartbeat terminated\")\n\n    async def _evaluate_local_state(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Determine presence state based on idle time and overrides.\"\"\"\n        if self._override_state:\n            state = self._override_state\n        else:\n            idle_seconds = self._idle_provider()\n            state = (\n                PresenceState.AWAY\n                if idle_seconds >= self.IDLE_THRESHOLD.total_seconds()\n                else PresenceState.ONLINE\n            )\n\n        if state != self._local_state:\n            LOG.debug(\"Presence state transition: %s -> %s\", self._local_state, state)\n            await self._broadcast_presence_async(state, {})\n\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n    # Internal - Sync Loop (Profile)\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\n    def _sync_loop(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Background loop for profile sync with exponential backoff.\"\"\"\n        backoff_s = self._sync_interval\n        while not self._stop_event.is_set():\n            start = time.time()\n            try:\n                self._push_local()\n                self._pull_remote()\n                backoff_s = self._sync_interval\n            except Exception:\n                LOG.exception(\"Profile sync failed - backing off\")\n                backoff_s = min(backoff_s * 2, self._max_backoff)\n            finally:\n                elapsed = time.time() - start\n                sleep_time = max(backoff_s - elapsed, 1)\n                self._stop_event.wait(timeout=sleep_time)\n\n    def _push_local(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Push local profile to cloud.\"\"\"\n        if not self._session:\n            return\n\n        with self._lock:\n            payload = self._profile.to_json()\n\n        url = f\"{self._remote_endpoint}/{self._user_id}\"\n        try:\n            res = self._session.put(url, json=payload, timeout=10)\n            res.raise_for_status()\n            LOG.debug(\"Pushed profile to remote (%s)\", res.status_code)\n        except Exception:\n            LOG.warning(\"Failed to push profile to cloud\", exc_info=True)\n            raise\n\n    def _pull_remote(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Pull profile from cloud and merge if newer.\"\"\"\n        if not self._session:\n            return\n\n        url = f\"{self._remote_endpoint}/{self._user_id}\"\n        try:\n            res = self._session.get(url, timeout=10)\n            res.raise_for_status()\n            remote_doc = res.json()\n        except Exception:\n            LOG.info(\"Profile pull skipped - network unavailable\")\n            raise\n\n        remote_profile = UserProfile.from_json(remote_doc)\n        with self._lock:\n            if remote_profile.last_updated_ts > self._profile.last_updated_ts:\n                LOG.debug(\"Remote profile is newer - updating local copy\")\n                self._profile = remote_profile\n                self._storage.save(remote_profile)\n\n        self._publish_profile_updated()\n        self._notify_profile_listeners(remote_profile)\n\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n    # Helpers\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\n    def _publish_profile_updated(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Publish profile update event.\"\"\"\n        try:\n            # Support both Event-based and dict-based event buses\n            from flockdesk.core.app import Event\n            self._bus.publish(Event(\"profile/updated\", payload=self._profile.to_json()))\n        except ImportError:\n            self._bus.publish(\"profile/updated\", self._profile.to_json())\n\n    def _notify_profile_listeners(self, profile: UserProfile) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Invoke registered profile callbacks.\"\"\"\n        def _run(fn: Callable[[UserProfile], None]) -> None:\n            try:\n                fn(profile)\n            except Exception:\n                LOG.exception(\"Profile listener raised\")\n\n        for listener in list(self._profile_listeners):\n            threading.Thread(target=_run, args=(listener,), daemon=True).start()\n\n    def _initialise_blank_profile(self) -> UserProfile:\n        \"\"\"Create a default profile for first-time users.\"\"\"\n        LOG.info(\"Creating new blank profile for user %s\", self._user_id)\n        profile = UserProfile(\n            user_id=self._user_id,\n            username=f\"user-{self._user_id}\",\n            display_name=f\"User {self._user_id}\",\n            preferences={\n                \"theme\": \"light\",\n                \"language\": \"en\",\n            },\n            layout={},\n            extra={},\n            status=PresenceState.OFFLINE,\n        )\n        self._storage.save(profile)\n        return profile\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def _default_idle_provider() -> float:\n        \"\"\"Default idle time provider (returns 0).\"\"\"\n        return 0.0\n",
  "file_path": "/app/project/flockdesk/core/services/user_service.py"
}

  "originalFile": "# Solution: python_desktop_development_expert_021_cross_file_refactoring_expert_01\n\n## Key Files Identified\n\n### Service Files\n- /app/project/flockdesk/core/services/profile_service.py - Original ProfileService managing static user data (DELETED)\n- /app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/service.py - Original PresenceService managing dynamic status data (DELETED)\n- /app/project/flockdesk/core/services/user_service.py - NEW unified UserService replacing both services\n\n### Consumer Files Updated\n- /app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/main.py - Updated to use UserService\n- /app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/viewmodel/presence_vm.py - Updated to use UserService\n- /app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/view/presence_widget.py - Updated to use UserService\n- /app/project/flockdesk/shared/widgets/avatar_widget.py - Updated to use UserService\n\n### Schema/Model Files\n- /app/project/flockdesk/shared/schemas/user_profile.py - User profile schema\n- /app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/model/user_status.py - User status model\n\n### Test Files\n- /app/project/tests/unit/core/test_user_service.py - NEW comprehensive test file for UserService\n- /app/project/tests/integration/test_profile_sync.py - Updated to work with new architecture\n- /app/project/tests/conftest.py - Fixed markdown code fences issue\n\n## Code Evidence\n\n### New UserService Class (created at flockdesk/core/services/user_service.py)\n```python\n# File: /tmp/project_copy/flockdesk/core/services/user_service.py\n# Lines: 1-100\n\n\"\"\"\nFlockDesk \u2013 Social Workspace Orchestrator\ncore.services.user_service\n\nThis module provides the unified \"UserService\" that consolidates all user-related\nfunctionality previously split between ProfileService and PresenceService. It serves\nas the single source of truth for all user data in the FlockDesk application.\n\nThe service manages:\n1. Static profile data (name, username, avatar, preferences, layout)\n2. Dynamic presence/status data (online/away/dnd/offline states)\n3. Local persistence with remote cloud sync\n4. Event-bus integration for reactive updates\n\"\"\"\n\nclass UserService:\n    \"\"\"\n    Unified service for all user-related functionality.\n\n    Consolidates the previous ProfileService and PresenceService into a single\n    source of truth for user data, managing both static profile information\n    and dynamic presence/status data.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        event_bus: EventBusProtocol,\n        user_id: str,\n        *,\n        storage: Optional[StorageProvider] = None,\n        remote_endpoint: str = DEFAULT_CLOUD_ENDPOINT,\n        sync_interval_s: int = 120,\n        max_backoff_s: int = 10 * 60,\n        session: Any = None,\n        idle_provider: Optional[Callable[[], float]] = None,\n    ) -> None:\n        ...\n\n    # Profile API (from ProfileService)\n    def get_current_user_profile(self) -> UserProfile: ...\n    def save(self, profile: UserProfile, *, broadcast: bool = True) -> None: ...\n    def update_preferences(self, **kwargs: Any) -> None: ...\n    def register_listener(self, fn: Callable[[UserProfile], None]) -> Callable[[], None]: ...\n\n    # Presence API (from PresenceService)\n    def get_presence(self, user_id: str) -> Optional[PresenceInfo]: ...\n    async def set_status(self, state: str, *, metadata: Optional[Dict] = None) -> None: ...\n    def set_status_sync(self, state: str, *, metadata: Optional[Dict] = None) -> None: ...\n    def observe_user_status(self, user_id: str, callback: Callable) -> Callable[[], None]: ...\n\n    # Unified View API (NEW)\n    def get_user_view(self, user_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]: ...\n    def get_all_users(self) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]: ...\n```\n\n### Updated PresenceViewModel (flockdesk/modules/presence/viewmodel/presence_vm.py)\n```python\n# File: /tmp/project_copy/flockdesk/modules/presence/viewmodel/presence_vm.py\n# Lines: 258-271\n\nclass PresenceViewModel(QtCore.QObject):\n    \"\"\"\n    Updated to optionally use the unified UserService for user data.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        bus: EventBus | None = None,\n        *,\n        current_user_id: Optional[str] = None,\n        user_service: Optional[\"UserService\"] = None,  # NEW parameter\n        parent: Optional[QtCore.QObject] = None,\n    ):\n        ...\n        self._user_service = user_service\n\n    def update_from_user_service(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Update the roster from the UserService.\"\"\"\n        if not self._user_service:\n            return\n        for user_view in self._user_service.get_all_users():\n            ...\n```\n\n### Updated AvatarWidget (flockdesk/shared/widgets/avatar_widget.py)\n```python\n# File: /tmp/project_copy/flockdesk/shared/widgets/avatar_widget.py\n# Lines: 197-229\n\nclass AvatarWidget(QWidget):\n    \"\"\"Updated to optionally integrate with the unified UserService.\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        user_id: str,\n        *,\n        size: int | None = None,\n        event_bus: Optional[EventBus] = None,\n        theme_manager: Optional[ThemeManager] = None,\n        user_service: Optional[\"UserService\"] = None,  # NEW parameter\n        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,\n    ) -> None:\n        ...\n        self._user_service = user_service\n\n        # If we have a UserService, load initial data from it\n        if self._user_service:\n            self._load_from_user_service()\n```\n\n### New Unit Tests (tests/unit/core/test_user_service.py)\n```python\n# File: /tmp/project_copy/tests/unit/core/test_user_service.py\n# Lines: 1-50\n\n\"\"\"\nUnit tests for the unified UserService that consolidates ProfileService and\nPresenceService functionality into a single source of truth for user data.\n\"\"\"\n\nclass TestUserServiceProfile:\n    \"\"\"Tests for profile-related functionality (formerly ProfileService).\"\"\"\n    def test_creates_blank_profile_for_new_user(self): ...\n    def test_loads_existing_profile(self): ...\n    def test_save_profile_persists_and_broadcasts(self): ...\n    def test_update_preferences(self): ...\n    def test_register_listener_receives_updates(self): ...\n\nclass TestUserServicePresence:\n    \"\"\"Tests for presence-related functionality (formerly PresenceService).\"\"\"\n    def test_initial_presence_is_offline(self): ...\n    def test_start_sets_online_status(self): ...\n    def test_stop_sets_offline_status(self): ...\n    def test_set_status_sync(self): ...\n\nclass TestUserServiceUnifiedView:\n    \"\"\"Tests for the unified get_user_view API.\"\"\"\n    def test_get_user_view_current_user(self): ...\n    def test_get_user_view_other_user(self): ...\n    def test_get_all_users(self): ...\n```\n\n## Analysis\n\n### Original Architecture Problems\n\nThe original architecture had user-related data fragmented across two distinct services:\n\n1. **ProfileService** (`flockdesk/core/services/profile_service.py`):\n   - Managed static user data: name, username, avatar, preferences, layout\n   - Handled local persistence and cloud synchronization\n   - Published events on `profile/updated` topic\n\n2. **PresenceService** (`flockdesk/modules/presence/service.py`):\n   - Managed dynamic real-time data: online/away/dnd/offline status\n   - Implemented idle detection and heartbeat publishing\n   - Published events on `presence.updated` topic\n\n### Issues with Original Architecture\n- Components needing complete user view had to interact with two different services\n- Risk of data inconsistency between profile and presence states\n- Increased coupling and complexity in consumer components\n- Difficult to maintain a coherent user state across the application\n\n### Solution Design\n\nThe new **UserService** consolidates both services into a single source of truth:\n\n1. **Data Model Unification**:\n   - `UserProfile` dataclass combines static profile fields with presence fields\n   - `PresenceInfo` for event-bus communication of status changes\n   - `PresenceState` enum for valid status values\n\n2. **Unified API**:\n   - `get_user_view(user_id)` - Returns complete user data (profile + presence)\n   - `get_all_users()` - Returns views for all known users\n   - Profile methods: `get_current_user_profile()`, `save()`, `update_preferences()`\n   - Presence methods: `set_status()`, `get_presence()`, `observe_user_status()`\n\n3. **Lifecycle Management**:\n   - `start()` / `stop()` - Controls sync threads and presence broadcasting\n   - `start_async()` / `stop_async()` - For async presence tasks\n\n4. **Event Bus Integration**:\n   - Subscribes to `profile/refresh`, `presence.updated`, `user/updated`\n   - Publishes `profile/updated` and `presence.updated` events\n   - Maintains backwards compatibility with existing event consumers\n\n### Consumer Updates\n\nAll consumer components were updated to optionally accept a `user_service` parameter:\n- **PresenceViewModel**: Can now bootstrap roster from UserService\n- **PresenceWidget**: Integrates with UserService for initial data\n- **AvatarWidget**: Loads avatar and presence from UserService\n\nThese updates maintain backwards compatibility - components work without UserService by falling back to event-bus subscriptions.\n\n## Implementation\n\n### Files Created:\n1. `/app/project/flockdesk/core/services/user_service.py` - 560+ lines, unified service implementation\n\n### Files Modified:\n1. `/app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/main.py` - Updated to use UserService\n2. `/app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/viewmodel/presence_vm.py` - Added UserService integration\n3. `/app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/view/presence_widget.py` - Added UserService integration\n4. `/app/project/flockdesk/shared/widgets/avatar_widget.py` - Added UserService integration\n5. `/app/project/tests/conftest.py` - Fixed markdown code fence issue\n6. `/app/project/tests/integration/test_profile_sync.py` - Updated for new architecture\n\n### Files Deleted:\n1. `/app/project/flockdesk/core/services/profile_service.py` - Replaced by UserService\n2. `/app/project/flockdesk/modules/presence/service.py` - Replaced by UserService\n\n### Test Files Created:\n1. `/app/project/tests/unit/core/test_user_service.py` - 17 comprehensive tests\n2. `/app/project/pytest.ini` - Pytest asyncio configuration\n\n### Test Results:\n- **17 unit tests for UserService** - ALL PASSED\n- **3 integration tests** - ALL PASSED\n\n## Summary\n\n- **Primary finding**: Successfully unified ProfileService and PresenceService into a single UserService class, creating a single source of truth for all user-related data in the FlockDesk application.\n\n- **Key components**:\n  - `UserService` - New unified service (flockdesk/core/services/user_service.py)\n  - `UserProfile` - Consolidated data model with profile + presence fields\n  - `get_user_view()` - Key unified API method returning combined user data\n  - Updated consumers: PresenceViewModel, PresenceWidget, AvatarWidget\n\n- **Architectural pattern**:\n  - Single Source of Truth pattern for user data management\n  - Dependency Injection for service consumers\n  - Event-bus integration for reactive updates\n  - Backwards-compatible optional integration\n\n- **Recommendations**:\n  - Continue using UserService as the authoritative source for all user data\n  - Gradually migrate remaining components to use UserService directly\n  - Consider adding caching layer for remote user data\n  - Implement proper error handling for network failures during sync\n",
  "replaceAll": false,

        Code Changes (12)
        
1. WRITE /app/project/tests/conftest.py
"""
tests/conftest.py

Shared pytest configuration & fixtures for the FlockDesk desktop suite.

The fixtures below try to isolate the *real* application stack as much as
possible while still giving tests full control over:

1.  A temporary, writable configuration/profile directory that is injected
    through the same environment variables the application uses in production.
2.  A lightweight in-memory event-bus implementation so that individual
    services can be unit-tested without boot-strapping the full IPC layer.
3.  An optional Qt application instance, created only when tests explicitly
    ask for it (‒k 'qt' or via the `requires_qt` marker).  The fixture is
    skipped automatically when PySide6/Qt is not available – this allows the
    test-suite to run in headless CI environments without a full Qt tool-chain.
4.  A dummy plugin-registry that mimics the public interface expected by the
    production PluginManager.  It lets tests register arbitrary callables/
    classes as "plugins" and provides helpers for assertions.

Pytest hooks:
    * pytest_addoption
    * pytest_configure
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import asyncio
import contextlib
import inspect
import os
import shutil
import sys
import tempfile
from collections import defaultdict
from pathlib import Path
from types import ModuleType
from typing import Any, Callable, Dict, Iterable, List, Mapping, MutableMapping

import pytest

###############################################################################
# ––– Optional Qt imports –––
###############################################################################

try:
    # PySide6 is preferred, but PyQt6 is accepted as a fallback.
    from PySide6 import QtWidgets  # type: ignore
except ModuleNotFoundError:  # pragma: no cover
    try:
... (truncated)
2. WRITE /tmp/project_copy/flockdesk/core/services/user_service.py
"""
FlockDesk – Social Workspace Orchestrator
core.services.user_service

This module provides the unified "UserService" that consolidates all user-related
functionality previously split between ProfileService and PresenceService. It serves
as the single source of truth for all user data in the FlockDesk application.

The service manages:
1. Static profile data (name, username, avatar, preferences, layout)
2. Dynamic presence/status data (online/away/dnd/offline states)
3. Local persistence with remote cloud sync
4. Event-bus integration for reactive updates

This consolidation simplifies the architecture by providing a single point of
access for components needing user information, reducing coupling and ensuring
data consistency.

Typical usage
-------------
```python
from flockdesk.core.services.user_service import UserService

user_service = UserService(event_bus, user_id="42")
user_service.start()

# Get complete user view (profile + status)
view = user_service.get_user_view("42")
print(view["display_name"], view["status"])

# Update preferences
user_service.update_preferences(theme="dark")

# Set presence status
await user_service.set_status("dnd", metadata={"reason": "In a meeting"})
```
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import asyncio
import json
import logging
import pathlib
import threading
import time
from dataclasses import asdict, dataclass, field
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from typing import Any, Callable, Dict, List, MutableMapping, Optional, Protocol

try:
    import requests
except ImportError:
    requests = None  # type: ignore

LOG = logging.getLogger(__name__)
DEFAULT_CLOUD_ENDPOINT = "https://api.flockdesk.cloud/v1/profile"

_JSON_INDENT = 2  # pretty-print profile on disk for human readability


# ------------------------------
... (truncated)
3. WRITE /tmp/project_copy/flockdesk/modules/presence/main.py
"""
flockdesk.modules.presence.main
================================

Real-time presence micro-frontend for the FlockDesk desktop suite.  The module
subscribes to user-status events coming from the internal event-bus, maintains
a reactive in-memory model and renders the data through a small Qt/PySide6 UI
implemented with an MVVM flavour.

The file can be started stand-alone (for local development) or imported by the
FlockDesk launcher which injects the shared ``EventBus`` implementation.

This module now uses the unified UserService instead of the old PresenceService.

Copyright:
    (c) 2024 FlockDesk Contributors – MIT License
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import asyncio
import importlib
import logging
import pkg_resources
import signal
import sys
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Awaitable, Callable, Dict, List, Optional, Protocol

from PySide6.QtCore import QMetaObject, QObject, Qt, QTimer, Signal, Slot
from PySide6.QtGui import QPixmap
from PySide6.QtWidgets import (
    QApplication,
    QLabel,
    QListWidget,
    QListWidgetItem,
    QVBoxLayout,
    QWidget,
)

# Import the unified UserService
try:
    from flockdesk.core.services.user_service import UserService, PresenceState
except ImportError:
    UserService = None  # type: ignore
    PresenceState = None  # type: ignore

LOG = logging.getLogger("flockdesk.presence")
LOG.setLevel(logging.INFO)


################################################################################
# Event-Bus Abstractions
################################################################################

    """Very small subset of the FlockDesk event-bus contract we care about."""

    async def publ

"""
FlockDesk – Presence Module: View-Model Layer
============================================

This file holds the *view-model* that mediates between the presence
backend-service (listening on the internal event-bus) and the Qt views /
QML components that render the roster.

The module is 100 % standalone and can be imported by tests without the
full desktop runtime.  It exposes one public symbol:

    PresenceViewModel  – A Qt QObject that wraps a
                         QAbstractListModel with presence data and
                         exposes commands for the UI.

Updated to use the unified UserService for all user-related data.

Author  : FlockDesk Core Team

    UserPresenceState = None  # type: ignore
